### Sean Waters — 2019-06-16T19:27:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-272739>

HUGE UPDATE -

So Tuesday night I sat in room and felt the decline of my mood from where it had been. A 3rd consecutive day of total Rain, with 4 days ahead and no good weather in sight. I start work Monday (tomorrow) and I cannot sit here and wait for the rain to pass. I need to act.

So I found cheap flights to Mallorca with my last £400. I am completely broke now. I booked a highly rated Hostel in the mountains and took the leap. All I knew was I needed UV and the mountains. I had no idea what to expect, who I would meet, what I would feel like.

I flew out and my ears were excruitiatingly painful on the descent into the island. That is a sign my Redox is utterly trashed.

I got to the Hostel and the village was absolutely beautiful. Surreal. All the Tapas bars/ restaurants had outside seating and the Hostel was 3 floors and big gardens overlooking the mountain range of the Tramuntana.

I met an Argentinian guy, a German girl, and a Canadian girl who is Sri Lankan born. We spent all day at a remote secluded rocky beach on the cliff side of a mountain...

There was **serious resonance between all of us.** It turns out, Me, the Argentinian guy and the German were all born in July of 1993. He was born on July 3rd, the day after me, and she was born 19th. The Canadian, was born in May. She is a Taurus. Not sure who believes in Astrology here... or Horoscopes... but the more I build a picture of our reality in my mind, the more I see those Giant Planets out there having a huge influence on our Mitochondria. I feel this, but I don't know it. If true, the Taurus is the perfect match for Cancer. She grounded all 3 of us, and me especially as I will explain.......

On another level of resonance, Me, and the 2 girls **ALL BOOKED OUR HOLIDAY TO MALLORCA ON TUESDAY NIGHT ON A COMPLETELY RANDOM "FUCK IT" DECISION IN 3 DIFFERENT PARTS OF EUROPE....... Quantum entanglement, or WHAT?

There were a lot of little nuances, and it was always 3 and 1, 3 and 1, 3 and 1. As in, 3 of us would share a commonality, and 1 would not. But it interchanged with all of us... what is the meaning?... 3 and 1...**

Funnily enough, I probably haven't had a better day than that day on the beach in about 3 years.

**I eventually told them all about Light Water Magnetism, and my story. It resonated like never before. All 3 of them connected the dots within minutes. As we were all sitting in a Rock Pool surrounded by little fish, with the Strong sun hitting our surfaces.... I even explained my thoughts on Information Theory and Turing.... the 1-0-1-0 code buried in the OAM of Light.

They all got it. And for the rest of the holiday, we all joked about "downloading that One Zero" and being outside.

Later, in the hostel, a local called Mark who was staying there (who was an ex-Heroin addict, but on his own journey to recovery), stated that we would get cancer from UV... before I even opened my mouth, the 2 girls stepped in and explained why that isn't the case, and how Light and Water is life, and how everything and life here has moved around the Sun and is what it is because of it is. He nodded, smiled, and lit up a cigarette and thought about it some more.

I was absolutely fucking flawed. Literally, one day with these girls.........**
**
The best 4 days that i've had in so long. Pure, pure resonance with the World... mainly with People, Water and Sunlight.

These 4 days has re-ignited my passion.**

And this girl, from Toronto Canada, who is actually Sri Lankan born. I've never felt so grounded and good in someone's company. We sat and spoke about Light, Water, Magnetism and Mitochondria for about 3 hours on the beach one day.

I drank about 20 cans of Beer in 4 days and ate Ham and Cheese Baguettes, Fruit and Tapas the whole time.

I didn't feel EMF sensitive in the mountains but I did in the tourist beaches near Palma where I measured the RF and it was insanely high.

Interestingly, that high RF beach nearly caused a huge rift between me and the girl, and the German girl that was with us. During the 2-3 hour talk about LWM and Jack - we were facing the other direction and we completely lost awareness - and the other girl was being ignored/ cut out. I never have such bad awareness, I am very socially aware, and she almost left and was in tears. Luckily, we absolutely begged her to stay and said that we could not let her leave without making things right... I felt so bad. She said "no, you too are in Harmony and that's why you must talk, but I am not so good with English".

She was right. We did have harmony. **But that wasn't the reason for excluding her, it wasn't the real cause our Myopia, the RF was...** I explained I could talk LWM to her and keep it slow too so she understood. Why did I not stop and think to include her?

I pulled out my RF meter and showed them. They had seen the levels at the beach the day before when we all felt like we were in the best dream in the world. The pair of them were flawed by the levels of RF.

They both said "holy fuck. This is it. This is why we have a problem". I didn't even need to explain. They both instantly knew.

I looked up at the Sun and said "Thank you, Thank you, Thank you".

I can't believe how much RF is impacting us. It literally changes the dynamics of our relationships and our resonance with each other.

I said, I'm not waiting 2 hours for the Bus back to the Mountain. I'm gonna pay for a Taxi. Way out of budget, but we got the fuck out ASAP and all felt 100x better and "normal" again.

On the way to the Taxi rank we saw a group of English lads on a Stag weekend and getting lunch. They asked me about my EMF meter that I was holding, 2 of them were interested but I basically got mocked by the majority of the group for what I explained to them about the EMF from there phones. One of them, some hipster looking lad, said "what are you a fucking hippie?"... I said "coming from you, you fucking dork"... all his mates started laughing at him. At the end, another lad said "hippie" under his breath as I went to leave. I stopped, put my hand on his shoulder and said "did you just call me a hippie?"... He said, "No..." and started giggling.

How fucking embarrassing?

In my mind, I had considered just offering them both the option to fight me. I'm not trying to be some "tough guy" on the internet. But, they were trying to ridicule a man on his own with 2 girls, with 10 of them sat at a table. I could feel my anger building from all the RF hitting me. In that moment, I would have fought the whole group by myself. I could feel the fire inside. My rage would have been too much for them. I could sense their weakness and they were threatened by me. So I didn't need to fight them. They didn't want any of me... a few of them took the name of Jack Kruse into their phone, the rest just sat there. Those few shook my hand and wished me luck with the holiday.

A very intense situation with some drunken idiots... that could have erupted. It was a great opportunity to show the girls how asleep everyone is, and how they resist being "woken up".

I write this, and I think about how those who push for RF may be able to read this. I think about how much pain, strife and hurt they are causing me and my fellow people for the sake of .... well, whatever the fuck they want from it all.... cause Money to me just does not make enough sense to be the reason for this.

I think they could be watching and plotting. This is a public site after all... well if you are reading this, GO FUCK YOURSELF YOU LOW LIFE FUCKING LEECHES. YOU WILL NOT DEFEAT ME AND I WILL NOT STOP.

I will educate every single person I can, and I'm getting really good at it according to those who I met this week....

So anyway, we got to the good beach again... and we go swimming in this rocky water. We swim out to a rock, and then swim back. On the return leg I dive below and smashed my face into a rock. My nose is completely fucked up pissing blood, everyone was really scared. But I couldn't stop laughing..... I didn't even flinch at the pain... I've had my nose hit before, and it fucking hurts... but in the Sun, it felt fine. They tried to get me to put Cream on it, cover it up, and they were panicking at the blood... I just turned around and lay on my back and looked towards the sun and said "DC current for the win"... they all burst out laughing, like I'd popped the tension inside them.

I had little waves of anxiety in between this confidence, as I thought I may have done long-lasting damage to my face, judging by the way they were looking at me. I said, "have I fucked my face up?"...

The Canadian Sri Lankan girl gave me the highlight of my trip........ as I was wiping blood off my face at the time and she stopped, looked me in the eye and said "its not that bad, it just looks bloody, but I don't really care either way crazy boy" and then she kissed me.

\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*

So, I'm home, I'm really sad but also really happy and hopeful...... I'm a slightly in love with a girl on the other side of the world... I'm still hyped about the whole trip.... my nose has healed up good but it is still quite a mess.... I am completely enlightened by the trip.

But I am met by the RF of the UK once more... my mood has began it's descent.

**Luckily, I open up my Inbox today and there is a company interested in signing me up to work in the Caribbean. They are seeking someone with my XP and someone with "no dependents/ commitments".**

I've already told this Girl, that I will be in Mexico in January and I will get to the Caribbean for good. She said she will travel 4 hours from Montreal (her new job/ life starts next week too in a new city) and come and see me in January when I get to Mexico.

She absolutely loves Tulum, Playa, the Sun and Cenotes. She is a fucking dream.... but waiting 6 months sounds like hell. This could be my Golden Ticket, I could be seeing her a lot lot sooner........

All of this, because it was raining so bad this week that I booked a flight to Mallorca.... The Entropy and Chaos of the UK environment forced this Black Swan In Training to act and move... despite being so broke, I had to move... I took the quantum leap and have been rewarded more than I even imagined.

**And in 2 weeks, 2nd July 2019, in Poland... I get to meet and shake hands with the man responsible for all of this.... and for changing my life....

3-1...

1-0...**

_Also I had a really strange freaking day. I met up with my buddy in Barcelona and he was like oh let's check out this gallery. So he takes me there, and without him realizing it, it was an exhibition on everything we fucking spoke about for the past three days

### Sean Waters — 2019-06-18T15:45:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-272834>

**Back at work** - the RF at my desk is minimum 0.2 volts/ metre. I don't feel too bad, but in directly in line of the Computer machine it is 0.5 volts/ metre. Pretty high... sitting in front of that saps my energy quite bad.

Generally, everyone here is really friendly and the job is pretty chilled from what I can see.

My commute is 30 mins, window down - sunrise on driver side on the way, sunset on driver side on the return home - which is nice.

Not in at 8am anymore, this place is start @ 9am. So I have 3-4 hours in the AM from wake up to get pre-Sunrise and then AM Light all morning. Back at 6.30pm and I have 3 hours of Sunset and PM Light. Plus 2 breaks during the day, 1 @ 11am and 1 @ 4pm.

It is a lot, lot better than working in London I can feel that already.

.... I think the recruiter for the Caribbean is on holiday this week, but I am chasing him to get an interview for the Caribbean job. It has to be happen a lot sooner than I first planned.

### Jenelle — 2019-06-19T08:45:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-272912>

I suppose I should post about this on my own journal, and someday I will. Just wanted to say I've given notice at my first nursing job because the place is just too fucking much.

I've stayed true to the promise to myself not to work night shift. And let me tell you, the opportunity is there for fat stacks of cash all night, every night, if I wanted it.

As I sat there doing my charting on the computer last night at 8:00, 9:00, all the way up to 10:00 pm ... I felt literally fried. The overhead lights beating down on me. The computer screen in my face. And the noise. Oh, my word ~ the noise. Alarms going off. People asking for things. (Often over and over again.) The phone ringing. Moaning. Coughing. Crying. Holy shitballs.

My point is that reading your journal, i am envious of your youth and your freedom. It may feel at times like you're bouncing around and unsettled ... but you're learning so much about yourself and what you really want/need in the process. What a gift, to be able to bounce. I mean, seriously.

And if hammer pants are required for a role in the movie, sign me up for a spot. That sounds like fun.

### Sean Waters — 2019-06-24T16:30:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273205>

Currently being taught a big lesson on Patience..... I am extremely impatient, it is one of the parts of my personality that lets me down and makes me quite anxious.

The response time from this interview has been 2-3 days and I'm desperate to know if I have a 2nd interview. I've also been impatient with waiting to speak to this girl who is living in Canada and is very busy moving house/ attending weddings etc.

Everytime I get the feeling, I either see or have a Spider on me.

Today I called the recruiter for updates, and there is no way he could've had an answer this soon from Friday night... and I look down and a Spider is crawling up my shirt.

I've seen about 6 in the last few days and generally in tandem with my impatience.

It is hardly a scientific reference, but I was keen to see what people who believe in Symbols and Signs from the Universe thought....
[https://www.powerofpositivity.com/see-spiders-meaning/](https://www.powerofpositivity.com/see-spiders-meaning/)

The two main themes are Patience and Creativity.

The spider is the most patient, as she carefully weaves her webs and creates and then waits for prize after her hard work. She also has 8 legs, which symbolises **_infinite possibilities for Creation._**

Perhaps I am being a little bit too airy-fairy here. But, I really like the lesson whether it is coincidental or not. But lately, I'm feeling coincidence is just a fool's explanation for Quantum Entanglement and Chance.

_**"patience n.** the quality of being able calmly to endure suffering, toil, delay, vexation or the like; sufferance. Sustaining pain, delay etc. without repining: not easily provoked,: persevering in long-continued or minute work: expecting with calmness."

**Chambers English Dictionary, 1988 edition.**_

I have the same issue when I'm working. I work very intently and I'm very impatient with my work, I hate waiting for solutions to be resolved. This actually stresses me, and I end up working at 300 mph instead of carefully taking my time and weaving my webs like the Spider would.

I am going to really hone on this over the next few days, weeks and months. Hopefully, I can weave a solution to this - and perhaps this will prepare me for my "stressful, hard work" job in the Caribbean (If I get it - which I seem to be talking like I have which is also concerning me), which will require a whole lot of patience while I sit in the blue light and RF office to earn my cash, and look out to the Blue Sea outside desperately wanting to run into the Ocean.

It will also take a long time for me to truly reap the benefits of the 12th Latitude, in Mexico last year things didn't move so quickly, I need to learn to be patient and wait for my reward. In this age of Tech and instant gratification it is a really really difficult trait to develop. Perhaps my symptoms won't disappear all so quickly. I need to be prepared to wait and endure. This is additive to the fact that I will be indoors so often, **_knowing what I could be doing outside (getting that UV 11 and IR to my mitochondria).

I am really going to have to learn how to be patient. This is a deep lesson for me right now, and I need to pay attention if I want to make a successful Web to build my Redox over the next few years.
_**

### Sean Waters — 2019-06-28T11:06:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273401>

I have a plan for the immediate future, I have 2 options.

1\. Get the Caribbean job in Construction as a Quantity Surveyor (my trade). The pay is really, really good, but the hours are long and 6-7 days in an Office. But, you get Block Leave of 5-6 days every 5-6 weeks, when I'll either chill on the Beach or take a flight to Playa DC. The issue is mitigating the RF and BL at work. I feel ok with this, based on my current n=1, my current Redox. But I know this will change down the line. But who knows how long?... based on the benefits/ risk ratio, this is my chance to live at the 12th Latitude and get an AM Sunrise before work everyday, even for 30 minutes, that would be ridiculous for my Mitochondria. I could also take regular, 5-10 min breaks out into the Sun all day (most people use this as a cigarette break). On my day off, I'd have so much Solar Yield it would be a joke. My only issue, is that potentially my Social Network would be poor - but that is an unknown, because the guys on site/ at work could be really cool... and probably will be pretty switched on if they live in that environment.

2\. Stay in my current contract, been here 2 weeks. High RF an BL, in the midlands in the UK. Pay is also really high. I'll look to "make it" to October/ Nov/ Dec, it feels alright now, but it is Summer Solstice. I know that will change even by September. I've managed to get my sleep back. But, my mood is poor at times. It will get worse in winter. I'll do as long as I can, reap as much cash as possible, and then I'll GTFO to Mexico for the Winter and live in Playa Dc or somewhere and build Redox.

While I'm there - I will be banging on the door of Caribbean recruiters - cause their biggest problem is _**trusting someone from the UK to come over and set up a new life, most of the time they hate it, but I got a major ace card in that I want to STAY LONG TERM for reasons they don't actually know. Convincing them is the hard part, but if I'm already locally based/ in the region, it might be enough to consider me.**_

Failing that, I take my 5 months of Mexico Redox and go back to UK for the Summer and work Freelance again and repeat the cycle.

At some point, the Caribbean/ Latin America construction job will land...

LONG TERM.... EMF/ 5G proof Construction Business - potentially offering Pre-Fabricated Modular Construction of Shipping Container Homes... but you are talking a Decade or so to get the Money and Experience and Knowledge to operate such a business.

### Sean Waters — 2019-06-28T11:09:10+0300

You have to do the best with the cards you hold now... And then every now and then you get a re-shuffle and a new hand.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-01T17:51:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273546>

Still waiting on a response....... Phone interview Friday 21st, 10 days ago... spoke to recruiter Monday 24th, he had not heard anything..... Then I left a voicemail with the recruiter last Wednesday 26th, and no reply.

He's on leave til Wednesday 3rd July..... (I'll be with Jack in Poland!) Really hope he gets back this week and sets up the 2nd interview.

Until then, I have to fly out to Poland and meet Doc.

I've done some CT yesterday in prep for this "kayak" tour we do in Poland, defo just an illusion for serious CT in the river. I clocked in 63 minutes @ 58 °F - pretty solid after a weekend of 30°C and getting a nice tan.

I've racked up 22 days without scratching/ waking up. I'm starting to fully sleep through now, 7-8 hours with no wake ups. Thank fuck.

But my skin is slow to heal, it needs Sun.

My mood is ok, but it can fluctuate quite a bit. Especially if I eat "off the epi-paleo menu" or have a beer or something.

Still absolutely set on getting out. This Carib job is my fucking ticket.

I'm also staying open minded to any opportunities that may come from the Polish Health Summit. Never know who I may meet and collaborate with.......

Still working on my Patience. I have cut through Taleb's Black Swan and picked up some epic wisdom.........

### Phosphene — 2019-07-01T20:07:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273556>

> [Sean Waters said:](/goto/post?id=273403)
>
> The Wisdom of Maybe.

I’m not so sure about this...

In my extensive experience with Maybe the endless waffling, vascillating, and prevaricating generally just means that shit gets decided and even less gets done.

Yes you must weigh your options and hold your cards close for awhile, but the thrill comes from making the play. You know all this of course.

I’m currently toying with the idea of a stint in the Peace Corps. I thought about doing it after college, but back then I couldn’t actually envision myself doing something so...impractical. Of course the deadline is today (aw snap!) so I’ll have a whole year to research and determine where to go and what to do. Mexico is an option but all the positions currently seem to require fluent Spanish.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-01T20:42:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273560>

[@Phosphene](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19648/) I'm more worried that you _**aren't**_ liking them! that is very out of character, normally I get 14 in a row once you've caught up - I'm not used to this reserved side of you!!

Yeah don't get me wrong - I hate waiting. But that is the whole lesson here, the Wisdom of Maybe, it is about learning from uncertainty. Having everything you desire on a 50/50 roll of the dice and you don't know the outcome.

Reading the Black Swan, the chapter at the end of his Essay section, is about Seneca the Roman Philosopher. Seneca talked about being _**Vale...**_ basically the meaning of that word is **"Strong and Valuable".
**
Taleb says basically, Seneca was trying to describe true stoichism as being **_Robust and Worthy._** In this sense, the Wisdom of Maybe is about teaching you about probability, and odds, and uncertainty. You can never really bank on what outcome life will give you, but what you can do, _**is you can make yourself anti-fragile, strong and robust to all of those outcomes. If you are so adaptable that Black Swans can't destroy you, then maybe in turn, you become a Black Swan?
**_
This is what I am taking away from this right now. My current future plans depends on this Caribbean Job coming through for me, but I can't seem to get an answer or a response, it all rests on chance now... Will it? or won't it?

**Regardless, just like the Animals, the uncertainty of it and the chance of a big devastating loss with a "no" from the company, I have to be prepared for either answer. That, I think, is the Wisdom of Maybe!**

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T15:40:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273853>

This was the morning after the first night, Sunrise, where me and Jack fully Quantum Entangled. More than anything, I really made a good friend that day, he's no longer just my mentor. I hope I can build on what foundations we laid down on this trip.

We had an EPIC discussion/ consult for about 2 hours in front of everyone on Music, Sound Therapy, Water, the Circle of 6 and the newly promoted #2 Healer = Friends, going "all in" for someone you love, and **_Embracing the Chaos.._**

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T15:43:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273854>

I felt bad, as we traded a lot this trip, I stepped back quite a lot to allow others their time with him after this and during the day of Talks including Jacks....

But on the evening, before the Boat Trip, right after Jack's talk on Friends (can't wait to watch it back)... it rained like fuck out of nowhere right after this and we got some Cold Rain CT in round the fire....

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T15:45:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273855>

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T15:56:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273858>

Right after this I got the chance to talk to Jack on the way up to the Boats... I told him about my recent experience in Mallorca, with meeting this girl and her seeing all the 1010101010's in the Art Gallery with the "Quantum Entanglement" event... I also realised me an this girl had flights @ 9.50 and 10.10pm... which is ten to ten and ten past ten... 10 10 10 10 10 10... I said, I want to know what you have to say about it...

"That is fucking wild dude. Ain't got nothing to say to that... when the Universe is talking to you like that, you got to ask yourself if you are listening"

I definitely took note.

The rest of the night we ate Pork and more of the amazing polish food (good lord the food the whole event was insane), drank Wine and had Mitochondrial Booster shots (lemon vodka) around the Fire...

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T15:59:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273859>

I met some incredible people... and I was that sad about leaving on Thursday that I nearly went to Munich and acted as Jack's social media guy to get VIP! But, the Flights went up Triple Price when I tried to book them - I listened to the Universe... **I needed to go and reflect on everything I'd learnt.**

So far, I've got 17 pages of notes from that trip. It is almost a complete script of everything that went down. I downloaded a huge amount of information.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T16:01:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273860>

I've created connections with so many people that I truly value.........

All those who were gathered round, when Jack said "These are your people"... you know who you are.

I'm so sad to be parted from **this family I have found.** But, I'm so moved by these people, inspired and **touched.** That, I can't actually feel sad, because I know we will all be together once again and re-unite our Circle of Friends.

I love you all.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T16:03:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273861>

Being home - it has been seriously Black and White how much my Circle needs changing. Even those I didn't think were "that bad", might need to be cut.

My parents are completely toxic to me... I never really saw how much they affected me in a negative way.

I'm looking to move out. But all the signs are blocking me, I think I may have to **_embrace the chaos_** here and suck it up.

I got another 4-5 months of work until I'll have enough cash to go to Mexico for 3 or 4 months.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T16:06:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273862>

The Caribbean job came back to the recruiter.... he said the answer is No... which was very sad to read when I returned home.

However, the feedback was "Sean was a solid candidate, there was nothing between him and the other except they were chartered".

So, they went with the other guy based on his Chartership. Fair enough.

But, I'm wondering how much he can handle living on a remote island... no "normal" food, no social, huge amount of Sun/ Heat... Is he a Mitochondriac?

If not, then he may pull out - this happens a lot over there. So, I've told them - I'm ready when they need me.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-08T16:07:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-273863>

Work here til Winter, and get out to Mexico for several months.

Once I'm there, I will be banging on the door to Construction companies in the Caribbean even louder... If I'm already there, they will see it as a much safer bet to employ me.

Time will tell...........

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-10T15:40:42+0300

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-11T21:27:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274080>

Not entirely sure, no.... I definitely felt impatient in the Water in Mexico. Jesus that bored the fuck out of me. I didn't feel the "Calm, meditative" effect that Lloyd describes.

I have felt it several times though, where I could've just sat in that spot - in the Sun. I have felt it a few times in the UK summer, I've felt it in Mallorca recently, but then - I was surrounded by people. I felt it in Poland too, but that was more Electrified Positivity.

I didn't feel it in Goa, or Sri Lanka (unless i was with people!), but I definitely didn't feel it in Mexico.

I've spent 20 years on Video Games, iPhones, Macbooks and getting instant gratification. I think my reward pathways are totally fucked up.

I'm open to any suggestions Inger - you seem very measured and patient, I'd love to learn from you.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-11T21:55:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274086>

[@Pablo](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/21859/) ... I haven't forgot the amount of times you suggested this - it is in CAPITAL LETTERS IN MY JOURNAL!!!

A big part of me wants to say FUCK IT - and go do this brother.

But, I am in debt to my own Company at the moment, not a lot, but a few months of work is needed before I can jump anywhere.

The other thing - sitting on a beach surrounded by idiots with Phones seems to make me feel just the same, it happened in Mexico and in Sri Lanka where the RF is high... I feel very bored and not good. The RF is very high on tourist beaches, especially in Spain. I don't tend to do well there.

I have to make this decision.... A part of me thinks you are right, a part of me doesn't... I'm not done thinking yet.

It was amazing to meet you, you were a highlight for me mate - I hope to connect with you again soon.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-12T11:45:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274140>

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=274124)
>
> so how do you live now Sean, when at home? Do you go dark and boring on a regular basis or do you start to feel uneasy about it. Have you tried to just be, not do anything, not escape from it in any way?
> I am not a fly on the wall..lol so I have no idea how exactly your days go on.. and what you do when you are off work
> but I have started to realize what a wonderful thing it is to stop running away.. from myself

Every night I get home from work, I light up a Fire in my garden, see the Sunset, and play my Guitar... it relaxes me and I feel good. Then, I take a cold shower and go to bed for 9.30pm! Black out my room and just chill until I fall asleep.

I wake up at 5am, get the Sunrise for 1-2 hours, and then I make Sardines, Mushrooms, 3 tbsp. butter and lots of turmeric, black pepper an spices. I always feel good after that.

Some days I have a Coffee with butter/coconut oil or cream. Then I sit an watch the Sun for another 30-45 minutes til 8am.

Then I shower, go to work for 9pm and come sit in the RF an BL all day.... usually, that's when I start getting impatient an really bored.

Days off - I'm outside, seeing my friends or playing music!

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-19T15:58:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274598>

[@5G Canary](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22671/) has inspired me to look deeper into my passion, and has highlighted a skill of mine I've ignored for a decade......... not just, "oh i'd like to do that", but what I truly enjoy doing.

I've realised today, that 10 years ago (one-zero), when all this started happening - when I first got sick with Crohn's Disease, Depression and started drinking alcohol and taking drugs - I made a choice to go in a different direction to what my School mentors were telling me. I decided to listen to "others", and go into Construction as a Quantity Surveyor... good money etc.

The only grade I got an A for in school was English Literature.

I've probably read Lord of the Rings 3 times. Plus the backstory, the Silmarillion etc. I've read A Song of Ice an Fire too. I'm quite obsessed with fantasy deep down... I'm a real geek... But I've suppressed it.

This 10 years, the One Zero's appearing everywhere, seem to be some kind of "Coming Full Circle" moment for me.

I meet Jack and everyone of my Quantum Wolves in Poland........
I meet an electric lady (Jimi H ref) in Mallorca who is stealing my heart and mind........
I know what I need to do and where I need to go to get Redox..........
I know how to heal, and also how to educate others and a future family..........
I know how to select my friends, who is really **with me** and who needs to be **without me.....**
I've picked up the Guitar, that I should've learnt 10 years ago, and started playing.......
I've started learning Spanish, something I ignored years ago.......
I know how to Eat, Drink, CT and Live to be completely optimal and control my health........
I've also become totally responsible for my own life, and no longer blame others for my reality.........
I've gone through wanting to be a food/ light guru func. medicine and I've actually set fire to that desire just 3 weeks ago.........

I'm at a point where I've mitigated all of my symptoms.... it's now been 6 weeks since I last had an Eczema/ Apnea episode....

Except one symptom, my fulfilment and happiness.

And I find my way Full Circle, back to that decision as a 16 year old, in July 2009 to not go further with English in College/ University... Where I was **afraid** to take the chance of being successful in it. Where I was afraid of criticism, and what I could potentially achieve with it. I used excuses like "ah it's too saturated, not enough money etc.". **It was all Bullshit. I knew in my Gut that I should have gone for it.**

I feel like this makes sense, on so many levels. But, I also don't feel entirely motivated by being a "writer" just yet... But I don't think I even really understand what it could be potentially be, or make me feel like - I've never done it! Nor do I really understand what I'm going to do with this, or if it **_really is what I want to do.. who knows?_**

But like everything lately... it's a tip of the hat from the Universe, it is a message... and I think I'm going to listen, and see where this lead takes me...

**I've learnt lately, often our own perception of the future is so far away from the magical reality that is provided, it begs the question "is it worth trying to think about what the future will look like, at all?"... instead, Stop deliberating and start doing...... In that case, Writing.**

In actual fact, as Christine highlighted to me......... I've got 30 pages of it already written here about my last 18 months on Earth.... most would probably think that was a Fantasy too, if they got through it all.

It's not quite Gondor, Rohan and a Ring To Rule Them All......... but it's pretty fucking out there.

Thank you Christine for lighting up the spark..........

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:13:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274667>

Sean your time was not wasted with me in Poland. That last post of yours made me smile........a lot.

When you see a pilot light go on.......it inspires awe.

When we spoke in Poland I sensed there was awe going on........so I jumped far out like I was on the rim of the Grand Canyon

Maybe you’ve felt AWE when you stood on the rim of the Grand Canyon. Awe also comes when you think about the vastness of space or glance up at the sky and [marvel at a supermoon](https://www.nbcnews.com/mach/science/how-see-biggest-brightest-supermoon-2019-ncna972311). Sometimes we feel it when you see someone offers up a personal story of devastation to help you light your own pilot light, and we can sense awe when we see a person give up their seat on a crowded train to another individual they've never met.

The emotion your feeling now Sean is awe. You should be in awe of what you just wrote. Psychologists tell us in research AWE can play an important role in bolstering happiness, healing, and bonding in our social interactions. Wasn't that the story in Poland my friend? — AWE likely has actually long played a role in how and why humans get along and ultimately cooperate with one another.

CITES:

[https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/02699930302297](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/02699930302297)

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:15:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274668>

Awe is designed to come and go in waves..........you are designed to be hit with these waves every so often.

Making sure your environment is filled with places and people who generate these waves are your job you facilitate with CHOICES

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:20:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274669>

I collect people who awe me..........You met a few of the Sean.

Neuroscientists who study AWE define it as the emotion we feel in response to something vast that defies our existing frame of reference in one area or another and leads us to change our perception of that frame of reference.

This change is what builds an open mind ready to be lit...........

AWE makes us small.........in the universe and we become forced to realize we are connected to a larger fabric and that fabric we need explore.

One important distinction between awe and other emotions (like inspiration or surprise) is that awe makes us feel small — or feel a sense of “self-diminishment” in science-speak. And that’s good for us in a nonlinear counterintuitive way.

We spend a lot of our time thinking about what’s going on in our world and what’s affecting us directly. Sensing and feeling Awe in our environment changes that, making us see ourselves as a small piece of something larger. This is why I elevated friends to number 2 Sean. You met some of my AWEsome crew.

Feeling small makes us feel humbled (thereby lessening selfish tendencies like entitlement, arrogance, and narcissism). And feeling small and humbled makes us want to engage with others and feel more connected to others.

Didn't that happen to our group in Poland?

Rhetorical question.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:22:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274670>

You can experience awe at varying intensities, and in your own ways Sean: listening to a moving piece of music like we did in Poland over and over again, seeing a giant skyscraper, or reading a newspaper story about a local hero, or hearing a story about a friend that shocks and awes you in some way.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:24:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274671>

Fundamentally, awe is about novelty and vastness. Physical space might create that vastness, as can someone’s talent or someone’s goodness, or their depravity and how they used it as fuel to make something awesome of their lives.

Awe comes in many forms. It is our job to find as many as we can.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:25:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274672>

And [negative experiences](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/27929301), too, can trigger awe (think natural disasters or personal ones.............

This is why wounds create wisdom.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:26:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274673>

Your post smacks that you need to be awe'd now........

Novelty is a big part of awe. Visit somewhere in your town or your continent or city you’ve never been. Try something new. Read about someone you don’t know much about, or a [biography of someone who inspires you](https://www.nbcnews.com/better/pop-culture/how-be-better-reader-ncna946166). Go see that chick in Spain on that Island..........

You spent a freezing cold sunrise with me in Poland on 7/4/19.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:29:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274675>

[Research shows](https://www.apa.org/pubs/journals/releases/psp-pspi0000018.pdf) that people consistently rank nature as one of the top ways that they experience awe. Try getting to a place where you can get a vast view of your environment (such as climbing a mountain or even getting to the top floor a high building). Or [just take a walk in whatever nature is around you](https://www.nbcnews.com/better/pop-culture/how-nature-can-solve-life-s-most-challenging-problems-ncna749361) and try looking for something you’ve never seen before.............I like seeing new people in Nature to be Awed.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:33:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274677>

**AWE is a parachute for thinking. It allows us to finally h[ave an open mind.](https://www.nbcnews.com/better/lifestyle/why-scientists-say-experiencing-awe-can-help-you-live-your-ncna961826#anchor-4Haveanopenmind)**

Part of the experience of awe is that feeling of smallness that causes you to rescale yourself — or see yourself in a different light.

This causes us to choose and act in new ways........

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-20T23:41:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274679>

If you want to experience awe with your new lady in Spain take her on a first date to the Cirque du Soleil. This entertainment performance group brings awe to audiences and this is why they are successful. If you observe how the company’s live performances elicit awe you'll begin to understand why these shows change brain activity in audiences. This group is studying these effects of AWE and their initial findings suggest when people report experiencing awe mapped to changes in patterns of brain activity linked to being more willing to take risks and being more comfortable with uncertainty.

That is when people begin to resonate with my messages..........risks and uncertainty build chaos and open us up by making us small and powerful.

This is how Black Swans are built.

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-22T16:08:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274750>

**Jack your Ten (One Zero..) responses, Comment 601 to 610... are duly noted. I would reply to each, but I think I'd rather continue this Awe with my Revelations this weekend in the Lake District.**

Things got even weirder this weekend, Jack you are going to be in Awe of this. Especially as this will resonate with you personally.......

So, after Friday writing that post, I got home and packed for the Lake District... remember my Friend, Cocaine addicted one I spoke about to you in Poland @ the Sunrise on the 3rd July... you told me to take him into the Water, like you did... and **Go All In** if I really cared about him, or Sever my Arm off...

Well, I did just that this weekend... suffice to say, I have returned after Swimming in Lakes and walking the Mountains, and one would expect my Redox to be through the roof with such low EMF and doing regular CT in the Lakes......... Right???????

But, I am absolutely exhausted. My mental energy hit a new low. My Gut is in disarray this morning. My throat was swollen all weekend... Why?

**My Friend was absolutely, utterly toxic to me.** What you said about **"50% of those who save others from drowning, die themselves in the process"...** I think this nearly happened this weekend.

22 years of Friendship. We spoke honestly of his addiction, and his issue... I told him, **"I am using every inch of my power to get out of that which is killing me, this Lake of Tar that is pulling me under... and you are Swan-Diving into it, actively trying to self-destruct and kill yourself..."**

**He said "You're right. I can't say anything to that."**

**He'd just told me that since his new Office Job in June, he's now taking Cocaine every other day, and using Xanax daily to get to sleep. He says he feels 75% the next day, but he can't go without it for more than 2 days now.**

Despite me presenting the Dopamine case... connecting his over-eating/ sugar addiction as a child to technology, showing how we both got sick from Gaming/ Living indoors, explaining how things have gotten worse from his Office due to Blue Light... EMF... every example, every possible angle I could've presented to him that his environment was the issue...

I told him to come with me, in November, quit everthing and come travelling... But, he said he would hate it, and that he thinks getting further with his Job and making more Money is the goal... he wants to start letting out properties, and thinks that will be his solution.

**I lost my head... I told him "how can you expect to make it 5 years when you are using Cocaine every other fucking day? when you are addicted to Bodybuilding every day, twice a day... YOU BURY YOUR MITOCHONDRIA IN YOUR MUSCLES, AWAY FROM YOUR HEART AND BRAIN........ AND YOU ARE GOING TO HAVE A HEART ATTACK"**

I was exhausted....... my throat was sore, my head throbbed.......

He kept stating that his problem was with himself, and that it wasn't the environment, and that he just needed to learn to control it himself. Moving isn't the answer for him.

And then, I realised........ I'm sinking myself, and I need to begin my Swim back to shore, to safety....... Then, I started to feel really sick of him... **I felt absolutely repugnant of his presence the rest of the trip. His arrogance, ignorance and egotism made me want to smash his head off the Car steering wheel. I couldn't wait to get away from him.**

All Day Sunday, and today, I've felt Irritated, Inflamed and Sick.... I've had Cognitive and G.I. Symptoms, like I used to get with Crohn's disease........ Nausea, Diarrhoea, Pains........ I got home, and lit a huge Fire for 3 hours and tried to remain calm. I couldn't even speak to my Mother or Sister, toxic in their own right...... I sat in front of the Fire and leaned in close and Sweated for hours until I felt better... I didn't eat All Day... All I wanted was to be rid of this Sickness, this Toxicity.

I said to myself, that is it... "he was the last Friend I needed to evaluate in my current location... my home town... now I know he has chosen the other path, and doesn't want to be saved...... I can truly move away, sever all ties, with nothing left behind"

**I had high hopes of him making it. But, not one person here is in my Circle of Six. Not one person made the cut. When I leave, I sever my Arm off for all of these "Friends".**

There won't be any part of me wondering If I need to leave once I'm out there, and "re-unite" with my old friends... I'm fully, fully done here. Maybe this is why I had to come back last year, because Mother Nature wanted me to learn this lesson.

It is probably the most Brutal of all the lessons I've learned........ and it is by far the most important.

But then something else happened as I sat, furious in the Garden........

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-22T16:16:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274753>

I reached into my Bag to get my Journal, and then found a Book that I'd put in there on Friday night to take to the Lakes.

This Book was one of my Favourite Films as a kid. I think it may have been the First Film I ever saw, age 7 or 8 years old when my Parents didn't know I was awake!

The Book copy was actually given to me by an Ex-Girlfriend. As a 16 year old - my last few months in school - I dated her. She was reading the copy in the lunch hall, and as her boyfriend I was surprised to see her reading one of my Favourite Films........ I shouted over "How do you know about **Interview With a Vampire?**"... she said, "Have you read the book?", I said no only the movie. She told me I needed to read it.

We broke up a month or so later. She was very controlling. But then we ended up going back out again in Sep 2014.. **_she was with me during my Descent into real sickness with Crohn's disease, after 5 years of mild IBS symptoms, the Real Painful Flare Ups began on 14th February 2015._**
_
**Valentine's Day, yep.........**
_
I had a violent, 8 hour episode, alone in my house, through the night - and that I thought I would die it was so painful.

We split up again, a few months later, I wanted to transform... I had found Paleo/ Biohacking and I outgrew her Controlling behaviours again. Funny enough, her last name was Frost. I always saw her that as a coincidence, as being with her felt like a Trap. Like my last name, Waters, but unable to flow like Ice. Restricted.

Anyway - she left me a Copy of this book.............

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-22T16:28:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274755>

After my revelation Friday..... my realisation about Literature, writing etc.

I was looking for Books in my Wardrobe, something that would entice me. I find this Book, and for some reason I popped it in my bag. I didn't look at it til Sunday night, when I was raging.......

So I started.........

**The story begins in New Orleans, Louisiana.......... and then I remembered, this Author is connected to Jack, this was told to me in Poland by someone close to him.

Jack, you are probably shaking your head right now?**

I was absolutely hooked. The initial chapters talk of the main character, Louis, and his struggle to deal with the Death of His Brother.

He absolutely loved his Brother, who was a Man of God. Louis owned a huge plantation and said he would give anything to his younger brother Paul.... until the Brother, who had said he had a vision from God that he needed to sell all his Land an Plantation to pay for the cause to restore Christianity to the atheist-ridden France of the late 18th century during the revolution......

**_Louis, laughs in the face of his brother and his Brother is furious. Later, the Brother falls down the stairs and dies after an argument with Louis.
_
Louis is utterly consumed with Guilt. And believes he is responsible for the Death. He sees how he was so Egotistical to laugh in the face of his Brother's request. Utter refusal to accept that his own Brother could have had such visions.... "not my brother... he could never be a Saint".

Louis then transitions into a Vampire, and is utterly disgusted at the Ego of his maker, Lestat... He cannot understand, and is repulsed by, how little attention he pays to the amazing sensory reality of becoming a Vampire.

Simply, Louis has transformed - become AWAKE to the UNIVERSE... and so far, he is increasingly frustrated with those who cannot see it either.
**
I haven't got any further than the first 50 pages...... But I am absolutely hooked so far.

This Book has so many links back to my childhood, where I would pretend to be Louis, playing Vampire games... it links to 10 years ago, the first time I was dating the girl who was reading this book... then leaving school, turning away from English Literature... then it links back to her again, on Valentine's Day, a violent transformation on a day of Lust an Love, where I was never able to see the World in the same way........ and now after a Decade... it links to Jack, and to New Orleans... it links to this resentment of Egotistical People and Their Ignorance, such as my Mother, Sister, Brother and Best Friends.... and it links entirely to my own Awakening and Transformation....

Louis is a metaphor, a polar-Metaphor to my own Life.......... the Sun can kill him, and he lives at night....

These revelations are A**wesome... and I feel so much Awe to be experiencing them... Like a Vampire to Blood, I can't help but want more.........**

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-22T17:02:48+0300

And just to add........... The Girl I met in Mallorca **_is from Canada... she lives in Montreal.............. I'd to love Fly Out to her but my Redox and Finances can't take it right now.

But luckily, she loves Cenotes and Mexico........ so we are planning Christmas and New Years together in either Mexico, Columbia or somewhere in Central/South America............ the Cirque Du Soleil plays in the Riviera Maya....... maybe we could stop by there over Christmas?_**

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-22T17:07:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274763>

> [Sean Waters said:](/goto/post?id=274750)
>
> **Jack your Ten (One Zero..) responses, Comment 601 to 610... are duly noted. I would reply to each, but I think I'd rather continue this Awe with my Revelations this weekend in the Lake District.**
>
> Things got even weirder this weekend, Jack you are going to be in Awe of this. Especially as this will resonate with you personally.......
>
> So, after Friday writing that post, I got home and packed for the Lake District... remember my Friend, Cocaine addicted one I spoke about to you in Poland @ the Sunrise on the 3rd July... you told me to take him into the Water, like you did... and **Go All In** if I really cared about him, or Sever my Arm off...
>
> Well, I did just that this weekend... suffice to say, I have returned after Swimming in Lakes and walking the Mountains, and one would expect my Redox to be through the roof with such low EMF and doing regular CT in the Lakes......... Right???????
>
> But, I am absolutely exhausted. My mental energy hit a new low. My Gut is in disarray this morning. My throat was swollen all weekend... Why?
>
> **My Friend was absolutely, utterly toxic to me.** What you said about **"50% of those who save others from drowning, die themselves in the process"...** I think this nearly happened this weekend.
>
> 22 years of Friendship. We spoke honestly of his addiction, and his issue... I told him, **"I am using every inch of my power to get out of that which is killing me, this Lake of Tar that is pulling me under... and you are Swan-Diving into it, actively trying to self-destruct and kill yourself..."**
>
> **He said "You're right. I can't say anything to that."**
>
> **He'd just told me that since his new Office Job in June, he's now taking Cocaine every other day, and using Xanax daily to get to sleep. He says he feels 75% the next day, but he can't go without it for more than 2 days now.**
>
> Despite me presenting the Dopamine case... connecting his over-eating/ sugar addiction as a child to technology, showing how we both got sick from Gaming/ Living indoors, explaining how things have gotten worse from his Office due to Blue Light... EMF... every example, every possible angle I could've presented to him that his environment was the issue...
>
> I told him to come with me, in November, quit everthing and come travelling... But, he said he would hate it, and that he thinks getting further with his Job and making more Money is the goal... he wants to start letting out properties, and thinks that will be his solution.
>
> **I lost my head... I told him "how can you expect to make it 5 years when you are using Cocaine every other fucking day? when you are addicted to Bodybuilding every day, twice a day... YOU BURY YOUR MITOCHONDRIA IN YOUR MUSCLES, AWAY FROM YOUR HEART AND BRAIN........ AND YOU ARE GOING TO HAVE A HEART ATTACK"**
>
> I was exhausted....... my throat was sore, my head throbbed.......
>
> He kept stating that his problem was with himself, and that it wasn't the environment, and that he just needed to learn to control it himself. Moving isn't the answer for him.
>
> And then, I realised........ I'm sinking myself, and I need to begin my Swim back to shore, to safety....... Then, I started to feel really sick of him... **I felt absolutely repugnant of his presence the rest of the trip. His arrogance, ignorance and egotism made me want to smash his head off the Car steering wheel. I couldn't wait to get away from him.**
>
> All Day Sunday, and today, I've felt Irritated, Inflamed and Sick.... I've had Cognitive and G.I. Symptoms, like I used to get with Crohn's disease........ Nausea, Diarrhoea, Pains........ I got home, and lit a huge Fire for 3 hours and tried to remain calm. I couldn't even speak to my Mother or Sister, toxic in their own right...... I sat in front of the Fire and leaned in close and Sweated for hours until I felt better... I didn't eat All Day... All I wanted was to be rid of this Sickness, this Toxicity.
>
> I said to myself, that is it... "he was the last Friend I needed to evaluate in my current location... my home town... now I know he has chosen the other path, and doesn't want to be saved...... I can truly move away, sever all ties, with nothing left behind"
>
> **I had high hopes of him making it. But, not one person here is in my Circle of Six. Not one person made the cut. When I leave, I sever my Arm off for all of these "Friends".**
>
> There won't be any part of me wondering If I need to leave once I'm out there, and "re-unite" with my old friends... I'm fully, fully done here. Maybe this is why I had to come back last year, because Mother Nature wanted me to learn this lesson.
>
> It is probably the most Brutal of all the lessons I've learned........ and it is by far the most important.
>
> But then something else happened as I sat, furious in the Garden........

I think cutting dead weight is among the best lessons we learn..........now will you follow through?

I shouted over "How do you know about **Interview With a Vampire?**"... she said, "Have you read the book?", I said no only the movie. She told me I needed to read it.
>
> We broke up a month or so later. She was very controlling. But then we ended up going back out again in Sep 2014.. **_she was with me during my Descent into real sickness with Crohn's disease, after 5 years of mild IBS symptoms, the Real Painful Flare Ups began on 14th February 2015._**
> _
> **Valentine's Day, yep.........**
> _
> I had a violent, 8 hour episode, alone in my house, through the night - and that I thought I would die it was so painful.
>
> We split up again, a few months later, I wanted to transform... I had found Paleo/ Biohacking and I outgrew her Controlling behaviours again. Funny enough, her last name was Frost. I always saw her that as a coincidence, as being with her felt like a Trap. Like my last name, Waters, but unable to flow like Ice. Restricted.
>

The book was written in the 60-s and 70's..........but Anne made sure she collected real-life energy vampires in the late 1980s and early 1990s to inspire her to further literary greatness. Often her inspiration leads others to their desperation. And others created their greatest songs ever........

Learning how to deal with the waves of relentless chaos can be good for others and detrimental to others.........it also breeds creativity because of how chaos alters dopamine.

Relentless chaos can be useful to the wise. With chaos, you learn that health is the slowest form of death we create..........

Control is wave.....is your life controlled? Are you being controlled? When you respond are you in control or uncontrolled? The chaos comes to us in waves of control. 'EXTRA'ordinary change happens in your life when you decide to take control of what you do have power over instead of craving control over what you don't. The chaos of control should be embraced fully. This is why life has to be PLAYED OUT and lived, not controlled; and humanity is won by continuing to play in face of certain defeat that chaos brings us in waves. Life is not designed to please us. We need to create that pleasing by controlling our choices of which waves we ride and which one crash into us. Most of us have lost touch with chaos and how it sculpts us. Chaotic Ideas that require people to reorganize their picture of the world provoke hostility, instability, and open our minds to changing what we've accepted in our lives.

What others call chaos are just patterns we haven’t recognized fully. What we call random are just patterns we can't decipher.......yet. The wisest, however, remain undeterred and continue to surf the waves of chaos to cipher those answers that elude us. (link:

) youtube.com/watch?v=KAM1wy…

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-22T21:33:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274788>

Sean, you might want to read the Rice series called the The Sleeping Beauty chronicles before you read the Interview with the Vampire. It is more germane to the recounted story in Poland. The first three were released in the 1980s (1981-1985) and this is what her environment was like in New Orleans from 1989-1995. Her Halloween Parties became must get to events because of the Vampire series and the Sleeping beauty series. Sometimes real life becomes more strange than fiction. The series was a trilogy but she added a new book in 2015 to make it a Quartet series.

I'd never listen to the Stones.........by the way.

### Jack Kruse — 2019-07-23T15:53:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274855>

This is breathing fire on pieces of broken glass........to make something new today:

If your life feels out-of-whack or out-of-balance, you’re likely avoiding the very thing you should be doing with your time. It’s only in doing that thing that you’ll regain balance and peace. Avoidance of what should and must be done in your life leads to busyness and distraction.

Today can be as great as you want it to be.
Your fate isn’t set. You get to decide how much of yourself you’re going to put into today. Are you finally going to go all in or continue to half-ass your life??
Today, begin differently. Rather than saying, “Well, we’ll see what happens,” you must powerfully state, “Today, I’m going to make shit happen all day long!”

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Edwsf-8F3sI](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DEdwsf-8F3sI%26fbclid%3DIwAR3JoPxw_ORG_F_59Vv2VK-yoTCr7rnO25wXcph_NR03P2K45AU103ClSLs&h=AT1XfZ1nbxEl5l583ut07q3YHGTGecVD9I9j-KyQOqCcj4KK631JH0D5sNk_FEAp6uxIyKIwFw8q59lX7-dQl-leFOrDKnvwg4n2tn_D_ffAyJnmdMo6L3S_xVRtQAJP43Uquc74mdeCHdffmayY1li6TAFlLO6_9CoAxM9okyGQbX2ipE3SzDiJn5ElZD8pkQ7ufpyBVSvpiMEkhg69ln82SOYAAYfYRPdxtqwM-IpP6MorwXfH2Tz2kCN4K_dH_rFRWMA1QxdHzEkvhvortXnsL3snCz4UtMKOq6boWH55xhyE3WuLUBHwXDaCMaiRS1SwVA88JFaqgD-9t7LbaI2mcQQPZp7E1RHoxFkhZNIbub0PhLzMboKeb-DhdlwKAcVCfcgM6IOMOFUfkNOs0mGzR5J2WGs9flRjSLr1qjWPugILAkEVdBev3yVa6HHrAVCdz79DXxn9M6AOhyx1YlYmx7W9x8V3sJTqGXB2VtwojKNeNcORUkN824_ygkI6gxfVhD1x3S6Yfk9tfGTchtQoK1qPXG6KE1AaeVsZcNy8pVQnm2PsTUWCvVbJRpP5FCrP5QgOgcQ3R0d9ucdSk8UmX1JrRVeGx-9-NkpqeCaAQXxXD_k5U-wSs7B97MmGCT1YrQzg0yNCgPZYleZ1FzWPyykBrMPzexD9WWl-hQmk6EcmqeR98IvWAu1MQIjzEBnAxeFbtGL8HGCXD01YvRtOL82QImQJ5ZJ41aq7BGaNrx91QrIgLfWE)

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-24T18:24:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274934>

I've just received this from one of my _**other best Friends....**_ He has been trying to set up a Remote Golf Coaching or Golf business for a long time in England. He isn't as EMF sensitive as myself, but he "gets" everything Jack is saying, Light Water Magnetism etc. and Redox.... for the last few months I've pushed him to change environment as he was struggling with depression, motivation and fatigue... leading a suboptimal life... after a long few months of resistance, and believing his dream will save him......... it didn't change, and he eventually said "Fuck it... I can't do this anymore", and surrendered himself to the will of Mother Nature... he moved to Tenerife 2 weeks ago for Sun an Redox, heavily in debt and lots of risk, he was hopeful he could get a job in one of the many many Golf courses out there...... he also made sure to take an EMF meter with him........ and after staying in a High RF hostel initially and struggling, he moved out to a very low RF hostel with Yurts in the hills.... He instantly rang me and said how great he felt after 1 night, and he hasn't left......... He's been exploring his options as a Golf Coach out there........ this is his latest email I received this morning after he "felt rough" by going Ketogenic, I told him to stick to what grows on the land, i.e. Fruits an Vegatables for Deuterium (with Seafood obvs)..........

_**"Yessss makes so much sense, also when looking at the land there really isn’t fuck all heavy fat- or much animal activity at all tbh apart from shit loads of seafood obvs. Cheers man, I feel EPIC today too so was definitely the fats slowing me down and I didn’t even sleep 10/10 last night too but I’m pumping with energy. And mate haha I’ll have to show you my journal entry from yesterday but long story short I bagged a teaching job at a golf club yesterday- literally to quote from Enrique the owner of the course “you came at the perfect time”. Coincidence that the timing aligned perfectly with the day my redox came around best?

I think you know that’s a resounding no haha it’s so plainly consistent that these lucky “breaks” happen when the redox is booming. So I’m buzzing mate, turns out the course is located right next to a marina where there’s very little activity around the beach and you guessed it, fuck all RF too. Just what I’ve been looking for as the heavily populated tourist beaches are cack. Also there’s plenty of English bombing around the location in the hotels nearby which is really nice tbh because I find myself chatting to people regularly with the energy I’ve got now haha.

So I’ve been practising on the driving range at the golf club this morning, I’ve stopped by the marina which is 5 mins away, I’m now sat at a bar having a pint of piss \[HE MEANS BEER LOL, SLANG ENGLISH WORD FOR BEER IS PISS - BECAUSE IT ONLY ENDS UP AS ONE THING\]

(because I can) for €1.50 as I write this email and I’ll be swimming shortly in the sea.

Mate, Tenerife is absolutely banging."
**_
I'm seriously grateful that as 1 friend slipped away, another 1 made his way to greatness... **Robin is 100% in my circle of Six**, and I'm hopeful if he can make a big success with his new Redox and Job that he may be able to join me out in Central/ South America this Winter....... or perhaps I'll end up in the Canaries at some point.

We actually met, completely randomly, in a Hostel in Bali about 3 years ago..... I'd just been left by an Ex-Girlfriend as she flew home earlier than I did, and I was lonely an depressed in this Hostel....... within a few days we'd compeltely Quantum Entangled... Since then, we've got closer and closer.... both experiencing the changes of the Leptin Reset, extra Omega 3, AM Light and CT etc. together and this Winter being seriously destructive to our Dopamine and our Redox state.

But now, I'm absolutely elated from that email... hopefully it gives serious inspiration to anyone else in a similar struggle, who are riding against the currents in their environment when all they need to do is turn around and Ride the Waves........

**Part of me thinks, maybe I need to do the same?.... What would happen to all my Debt and Ties here if I just up and left?**

**Do I need to take a leaf out of my OWN BOOK?? And adhere to my own advice???**

### Sean Waters — 2019-07-24T18:33:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-274936>

Meanwhile.............. for Me........... I've spent every hour alone the last 24 hours in Silence, just thinking.

Control. This is everything.

I got home last night, and sitting in the Garden under the WiFi, I listened to my Parents talk about work and I felt my Gut go tight and my feelings changed to their presence.

I got up and walked out without a word.

I spent last night at a Lake nearby to my home, low RF, watching the Sun go down. And I got absolutely pissed on by about 10 mins of Rain.

I came home seriously calm, happy and rejuvenated.

This morning I spent 30 mins doing CT in an Ice Bath... it has made me feel the best I've felt at work for a long time.

**_"If your life feels out-of-whack or out-of-balance, you’re likely avoiding the very thing you should be doing with your time. It’s only in doing that thing that you’ll regain balance and peace."_**

I can't change the fact I have to go to work, pay back the Debt, and live at my Parents house for the next 18 weeks.........

But what I can do, is change the things under my control. The small things....... going to the Lake, doing that little bit of CT before work, eating Mackerel instead of Farmed Salmon........ Avoiding Toxic Friends, Toxic Foods.... This is how I establish control of those Waves of Chaos.... **because it is only the Waves in my immediate environment that I need to worry about, not the ones that are far away.... The Surfer doesn't concern himself with every wave in the Sea, only the ones around him........**

That was not made by the hands of men

Between the dawn and the dark of night
And if you go no one may follow

When there is no pebble tossed
Nor wind to blow

But if you fall you fall alone

### Phosphene — 2019-08-04T17:27:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-275424>

I reluctantly get what you mean by not being anchored to one spot. I struggle with freedom vs security constantly. It’s tough to explain to my sons why I no longer recommend they purchase property, except if they plan to be landlords. Do we hang on to our 6 acres of rural temperate woods where nature in all her forms appears to be thriving? Part of me keeps thinking they (and I) need a sanctuary to return to if their mitos start to fail and they finally grasp what I mean. I admit we’re not fully prepared for an extreme SHTF scenario, but surely we’d be better off here than wandering? Or would we?

They are talking about renting a place in Philly in a few years once the youngest finishes uni. Trying to nip that in the bud of course but how can I blame them for wanting to get their yayas out in the city for a few years?! I did. And look at me—I survived. Barely. Do I need to just let them learn their lessons and hope they get out in time??

A friend of mine is designing a tiny house on wheels for her alternate “retirement” and just got knocked back by the reality of the expense of building what she wants. The custom windows themselves are eating up much of the budget. I think she needs time to mourn the loss of her glamorous tiny house vision...

And I need more time to mourn the eventual loss of “my” land. I understand that of course it’s not really mine—stop paying mortgage, insurance and taxes and it quickly becomes the government’s property...

Good grief. I’m just going to enjoy the brilliant sun now while I can to keep building my redox.

### Sean Waters — 2019-08-05T13:58:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-275452>

I think it all comes down to your own personal context, and you have to have all the information you can get to make the best decision.

I think deciding or advising your sons is probably flawed in itself, but advising them how to acquire the data they need to make their choices isn't!

Me and my Mother had a "collision" of sorts this weekend, I had a mini-breakdown and lost control of my Surfboard and got swamped by a raging Sea of Depression that I thought could never end. I ended up sitting in the shower, fucking shaking with rage... every molecule in me wanted to just get a flight out. I left the bathroom in a mess of water, and fell asleep on my bed in a daze of frustration and sadness.

She came back Drunk and burst into my room and kicked off, spraying me with words and blue light and I absolutely lost my shit.

The next morning we spoke, and I was feeling a lot better...

We both apologised, and I said "I'd broken down, and I'm very close to the edge", instantly she tried to start telling me what to do and she got all irritated as if the answer was so clear to her... this is the part that pisses me off the most, because it is always **really, really bad advice because she doesn't believe in any of this stuff.** So she starts telling me what I needed to do and she got shut down. I explained "there is no piece of my advice you can give me that is worth the breath you waste on it, because you've never walked a mile in my shoes, and **you have no Skin in the Game, and absolutely no Skin in MY GAME**", I don't know where it came from... but she just shut up and nodded her head.

She enquired on my plans then, which she knew nothing about as we've hardly spoken for weeks... It ended up with her realising that I got everything laid out well, but that my situation is completely "mammoth" as her words described and there is nothing she could do to help me... especially as I listed out Friend after Friend from my generation that is sick, and those that I'm meeting in November in Mexico, all trying to flee their 4G/5G environment... I listed out 3 friends addicted to cocaine, another fled to Tenerife that she met recently, all the guys from Poland...

She defaulted to "how about I give you some money so you can fly to tenerife to see him", and I rejected it immediately. I have money, but I said "What I really need is you to cut me some slack, and stop fighting me, to understand the situation I'm in, and give me some room to operate while I get the fuck out of here... "

It hit her then, "you aren't ever coming back are you? This time it really is for good...", she looked like she was about to cry. She said she would fly out to me, wherever I am, and maybe one day we could re-connect.

It was really upsetting, it upsets me as I write this. Despite all the recent animosity between us, and how much I've been frustrated and sick of her, at the core of it we are Mother and Son. The same Mitochondria run in my cells as do hers.

The difference is, our Reality is totally different, and so our Choices and way of thinking are totally different.

Her Redox is fine, and she sees now "it is all your generation, you are all so sick... what is going to happen Sean?". I explained how our Un-Myelinated CNS makes it like pouring Acid on an Open-Wound while we develop, and our exposure is so much greater. But I also said there are others, older generation, that are just as sick...... I explained it may happen to her, and the likelihood is higher than ever with the changes coming.

I finished Interview With The Vampire at the weekend...... the last part hit me like a diamond bullet, not the deaths, but the understanding from Louis that the entire journey, all the events and everything was caused by his irrefutable will to live one more day, and to say No, once more... to Death......

### 5G Canary — 2019-08-05T17:22:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-275460>

> [Sean Waters said:](/goto/post?id=275452)
>
> I had a mini-breakdown and lost control of my Surfboard and got swamped by a raging Sea of Depression that I thought could never end.

Lost control of your surf board....I have such empathy for what you and your mom are going through. Us EHS canaries have been dropped in this chaotic nnEMF ocean of waves and are forced to surf with no lessons and while blindfolded. Surfing on these very real but invisible waves is no easy task. These nnEMF waves can certainly pull us under and drown us... but only if we let them. Like in real surfing, the key is being aware and feeling for the swells that are coming. Myself and my entire family, daughters included, are forced to surf these waves as well. I wish there was an easy answer or solution but I think we all know there isn’t.... these are dangerous uncharted waters. These waters are also filled with the sharks that created these waves ....circling us as well. We are the new breed of surfers that unfortunately, have to ride first and use our intuition to keep from drowning.

We’ve been dropped in the “new ocean” and have to figure out how not to get knocked down into the chaos of 1G-5G waves hitting us from all directions. People can’t understand how one minute we are okay and the next we are hit with a wave of depression, anxiety or anger. We are forced to surf as our bodies are being microwaved and our brains are being manipulated by the waves. While most don’t understand they are in the chaos of these waves too....we do. The need to get out of these waves is more intense for us because we are following a sixth sense. Keep following your intuition Sean- it is guiding you.

Remember we can’t stop the waves but we can learn to ride them safely or, move to safer point breaks... harbors. The more we ride them (or avoid the really dangerous ones) the better we get at it. We need to ride them with closed eyes as we need to rely on our intuition and sixth sense. If we can master it.....we will need to find the eye of the wave. Trusting that eye will lead us to the tube... which is our faraday cage and safe place.

### Sean Waters — 2019-08-06T12:31:45+0300
