### Sean Waters — 2020-06-01T19:17:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-289967>

Getting here was full of uncertainty.... silly people with Police uniforms telling people what they can and can't do all over the Lake I was at. It's like a little socialist state. The mayor is a fucking idiot. In fact, extend that to all the politicians across the globe. THink you have to be one just to get the job these days.

I'm with a girl who wanted to leave Guatemala, she's extremely at the other end of optimal... diazepam and meds for anxiety, Chicago born - rich christian family, major mental health issues.... but above all of that, and more importantly, a really sweet and kind girl who has been molested by her environment.

She's joined my leap to Mexico, which everyone said was crazy and stupid and a bad idea, and instead of us parting ways to separate hostels.... we've wound up in the only place that would take us in.... a guest house run by venezuelans who are all Ketogenic... never been to a hostel in my life with owners who are Keto. They even know about the artificial light...... [@5G Canary](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22671/)... who would have guessed this was over the horizon?

We've fell into a little family here.

The girl I'm with has had a full intro to Light Water Mag and is now being bolstered into positive thinking by an amazing family here..... genuinely, we turned up at the door and they let us in despite it technically being illegal to have guests right now.

She's starting to transform.

A part of me wants to cut loose and the other part of me is witnessing a girl completely change under a new environment.... with new people.... no drugs, no negativity, no vampires....

I went back to Tulum yesterday, into town, where I spent Christmas with my Ex. I was expecting an emotional time, but it really left me breathless. The memories, the restaurants, the bars, the sights... jesus christ, every emotional trigger you could imagine.... I just immersed into it like a Cold Tub and slowed my heart rate and focused my breath.... looked up at the Sun behind the 4G towers and looked everything dead in the eye.

I faced my heartbreak yesterday. It all became real again for a few hours. I even ate with my friend at my Ex's favourite restaurant - Don Cafeto. (fucking amazing Talpequeno btw).

What made it all the more surreal.... was the whole place was like Post-Apocalyptic. Some kind of Nuclear Fall-Out. Everywhere closed. The streets only populated with locals and lingering expats, no cars through the main street, just bicycles.... every clothing store shut. Every restaurant and bar completely empty, except the bare bones that offered take outs and some coffee.

You can't imagine how Polarising this was to my mind. To revisit this place, these emotions, in such circumstances.... It was like a movie. I can't really describe it. It was like all the Love and Happiness I had at Christmas was coupled to the life of this town.... now both were gone.... but, although I was saddened by it, it kind of felt like it was for the best - the underlying feeling was that this is necessary.

It's time to move forward.

**Tulum/ Mexico..........
**
First thing I noticed as I grounded to the Stone swimming pool, was how much tranquility returned to my body. The IR/ Heat was absent, it is fairly cool here, and cloudy without much Sun. I hadn't had Seafood yet either.

I can only guess - it's the **Magnetism** of this earth here. The enormous vast cenote system below me.

My Gut instantly responded to being here. It's just started acting normal again. My mind is really really at peace again. I feel so calm.

The same feelings I had in **Merida in February.... Libido coming back, everything feels like it is in synchrony.
**
Despite the fact that there are many cell towers around, and the RF here is quite high as it was in Merida Hostel, I'm feeling much better.

The Magnetism must be the key factor. It has to be, right?

Who cares.

All I know for sure - is that I won't be leaving the Yucatan peninsula in a hurry. I tested another place, and I learned BIG TIME about my self and my body. Now I need to stop experimenting and start building again.

A reflection of our own minds and thoughts? Or simply a byproduct of an interconnected universe with a purely scientific explanation? And if so, what are the implications of this? Magic and Miracles are all around us!

> I'm with a girl who wanted to leave Guatemala, she's extremely at the other end of optimal... diazepam and meds for anxiety, Chicago born - rich christian family, major mental health issues.... but above all of that, and more importantly, a really sweet and kind girl who has been molested by her environment.
>
> She's joined my leap to Mexico, which everyone said was crazy and stupid and a bad idea, and instead of us parting ways to separate hostels.... we've wound up in the only place that would take us in.... a guest house run by venezuelans who are all Ketogenic... never been to a hostel in my life with owners who are Keto. They even know about the artificial light...... [@5G Canary](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22671/)... who would have guessed this was over the horizon?
>
> We've fell into a little family here.
>
> The girl I'm with has had a full intro to Light Water Mag and is now being bolstered into positive thinking by an amazing family here..... genuinely, we turned up at the door and they let us in despite it technically being illegal to have guests right now.
>
> She's starting to transform.
>
> A part of me wants to cut loose and the other part of me is witnessing a girl completely change under a new environment.... with new people.... no drugs, no negativity, no vampires....
>
> I went back to Tulum yesterday, into town, where I spent Christmas with my Ex. I was expecting an emotional time, but it really left me breathless. The memories, the restaurants, the bars, the sights... jesus christ, every emotional trigger you could imagine.... I just immersed into it like a Cold Tub and slowed my heart rate and focused my breath.... looked up at the Sun behind the 4G towers and looked everything dead in the eye.
>
> I faced my heartbreak yesterday. It all became real again for a few hours. I even ate with my friend at my Ex's favourite restaurant - Don Cafeto. (fucking amazing Talpequeno btw).
>
> What made it all the more surreal.... was the whole place was like Post-Apocalyptic. Some kind of Nuclear Fall-Out. Everywhere closed. The streets only populated with locals and lingering expats, no cars through the main street, just bicycles.... every clothing store shut. Every restaurant and bar completely empty, except the bare bones that offered take outs and some coffee.
>
> You can't imagine how Polarising this was to my mind. To revisit this place, these emotions, in such circumstances.... It was like a movie. I can't really describe it. It was like all the Love and Happiness I had at Christmas was coupled to the life of this town.... now both were gone.... but, although I was saddened by it, it kind of felt like it was for the best - the underlying feeling was that this is necessary.
>
> It's time to move forward.
>
> **Tulum/ Mexico..........
> **
> First thing I noticed as I grounded to the Stone swimming pool, was how much tranquility returned to my body. The IR/ Heat was absent, it is fairly cool here, and cloudy without much Sun. I hadn't had Seafood yet either.
>
> I can only guess - it's the **Magnetism** of this earth here. The enormous vast cenote system below me.
>
> My Gut instantly responded to being here. It's just started acting normal again. My mind is really really at peace again. I feel so calm.
>
> The same feelings I had in **Merida in February.... Libido coming back, everything feels like it is in synchrony.
> **
> Despite the fact that there are many cell towers around, and the RF here is quite high as it was in Merida Hostel, I'm feeling much better.
>
> The Magnetism must be the key factor. It has to be, right?
>
> Who cares.
>
> All I know for sure - is that I won't be leaving the Yucatan peninsula in a hurry. I tested another place, and I learned BIG TIME about my self and my body. Now I need to stop experimenting and start building again.

We cannot see UV, IR-A to IR-C, or Magnetism. Nor can we "see" different types of Water, or notice a difference very easily.

The only thing we can use is "how I **FEEL"** in this given moment...... **_but that is such a poor measure of what is good for us.

Even in February this year, I was doing so well, but I went to Guatemala to chase more Optimal because on paper it was better.... more Sun/ High altitude/ lower EMF.

It was during Cristobal Hurricane, so I had no direct Sun for 2 weeks.......... when I had no Sun in Guatemala, I would feel terrible, but I Still felt great when I Got here.

Now the Sun is back, I Feel amazing, but it taught me the MAGNETISM Story - and why it's so important - and also, what it "Feels" like.

**So how could I feel bad in March 2018, in the same spot, and in June 2020 I feel fucking amazing, in the exact same area?

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:28:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290202>

[https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816)

**The Vitamin D Receptor Inhibits the Respiratory Chain, Contributing to the Metabolic Switch that Is Essential for Cancer Cell Proliferation**

-   Marco Consiglio ,
-   Michele Destefanis ,
-   Deborah Morena,
-   Valentina Foglizzo,
-   Mattia Forneris,
-   Gianpiero Pescarmona,
-   Francesca Silvagno

-   Published: December 29, 2014
-   [https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0115816](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0115816)

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:30:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290203>

We recently described the mitochondrial localization and import of the vitamin D receptor (VDR) in actively proliferating HaCaT cells for the first time, but its role in the organelle remains unknown. Many metabolic intermediates that support cell growth are provided by the mitochondria; consequently, the identification of proteins that regulate mitochondrial metabolic pathways is of great interest, and we sought to understand whether VDR may modulate these pathways. We genetically silenced VDR in HaCaT cells and studied the effects on cell growth, mitochondrial metabolism and biosynthetic pathways. VDR knockdown resulted in robust growth inhibition, with accumulation in the G0G1 phase of the cell cycle and decreased accumulation in the M phase. The effects of VDR silencing on proliferation were confirmed in several human cancer cell lines. Decreased VDR expression was consistently observed in two different models of cell differentiation. The impairment of silenced HaCaT cell growth was accompanied by sharp increases in the mitochondrial membrane potential, which sensitized the cells to oxidative stress. We found that transcription of the subunits II and IV of cytochrome c oxidase was significantly increased upon VDR silencing. Accordingly, treatment of HaCaT cells with vitamin D downregulated both subunits, suggesting that VDR may inhibit the respiratory chain and redirect TCA intermediates toward biosynthesis, thus contributing to the metabolic switch that is typical of cancer cells. In order to explore this hypothesis, we examined various acetyl-CoA-dependent biosynthetic pathways, such as the mevalonate pathway (measured as cholesterol biosynthesis and prenylation of small GTPases), and histone acetylation levels; all of these pathways were inhibited by VDR silencing. These data provide evidence of the role of VDR as a gatekeeper of mitochondrial respiratory chain activity and a facilitator of the diversion of acetyl-CoA from the energy-producing TCA cycle toward biosynthetic pathways that are essential for cellular proliferation.

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:33:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290204>

Resistance to the nuclear effects of vitamin D has been reported in several models of cancer, including prostate, breast and bladder cancers, in which increased corepressor expression and localization has been deemed to be responsible for the insensitivity to the hormone [\[2\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Khanim1)–[\[4\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Abedin1).

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:34:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290205>

In fact, the rapid, nongenomic effects of vitamin D appear to be mediated by the VDR [\[5\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Huhtakangas1)–[\[7\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Sequeira1). Many steroid receptors and nuclear transcription factors enter the mitochondrial compartment, where they either exert transcriptional regulation of mitochondrial DNA or control mitochondrial biogenesis and metabolism [\[8\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-GavrilovaJordan1)–[\[11\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Lee1). We recently described the mitochondrial localization of the VDR in a human proliferating keratinocyte cell line (HaCaT) for the first time and demonstrated that mitochondrial import of the receptor is mediated by the permeability transition pore complex [\[12\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Silvagno1).

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:35:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290206>

Several studies have indicated that mitochondrial dysfunction contributes to the development and progression of various human diseases, including cancer [\[13\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Galluzzi1). A hallmark of tumor cells is altered metabolism supporting rapid cellular proliferation [\[14\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Hanahan1). Many metabolic intermediates that support cell growth are provided by the mitochondria [\[15\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Schulze1); consequently, the identification of proteins that regulate mitochondrial metabolic pathways is of great interest, and we sought to understand whether the VDR may modulate these pathways.

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:40:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290207>

Based on these observations, we concluded that the VDR inhibited the mitochondrial membrane potential and likely restrained ROS production, protecting the cell from additional oxidative stress. On the contrary, VDR loss increased the respiratory potential, but rendered cells more prone to an oxidant-driven potential collapse. This possibility was supported by the significantly lower glutathione (GSH) consumption in wild type cells, as revealed by the higher levels of the antioxidant molecule that were measured in wild type cells compared to silenced cells ([S3 fig](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816.s003).).

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:44:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290208>

Mitochondrial potential is sustained by the proton gradient that is created by respiratory chain activity; therefore, we decided to examine the expression of two subunits of complex IV: Cytochrome c oxidase (COX) subunits II and IV, whose transcripts are of mitochondrial (the former) and nuclear (the latter) origin. Both nuclear- and mitochondrially encoded proteins are required for the formation of active respiratory complexes. Mitochondrial RNAs are transcribed as long, polycistronic precursor transcripts that are later processed to release individual rRNAs and mRNAs. Therefore, we considered COX II to be a marker of mitochondrial transcription activity and COX IV to be a marker of the nuclear contribution to respiratory chain modulation.

[fig. 4C](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone-0115816-g004)). In order to confirm that the VDR negatively affected COX transcription, we treated wild type HaCaT cells with vitamin D and observed that the levels of all of the transcripts were decreased ([fig. 4D](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone-0115816-g004)). Given the fact that the transcription of subunit IV is nuclear, whereas that of subunit II is encoded by mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA), we concluded that vitamin D transcriptional control is exerted at both levels, which is not surprising given the fact that nuclear and mitochondrial transcription of respiratory chain proteins is finely tuned [\[20\]](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0115816#pone.0115816-Ryan1).

### Sean Waters — 2020-06-12T18:45:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-290209>

The increased membrane potential that was observed in the silenced cells, combined with the induced expression of COX transcripts, demonstrated that the respiratory chain was potentiated in silenced HaCaT cells.

Taken together, our results indicate that the VDR plays a role in the negative modulation of respiratory chain expression and respiratory activity, which both moderates membrane potential and is protective against oxidative stress.

### Sean Waters — 2020-08-15T18:17:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-291536>

-   As lead singer Maynard James Keenan explains on commentary on _aMOTION_, his mother Judith Marie suffered a stroke in 1976 that left her partially paralyzed and wheelchair-bound. The length of time between her paralysis and her death was 27 years, or approximately 10,000 days. [\>>](https://www.songfacts.com/facts/tool/10000-days-wings-pt-2?fbclid=IwAR2Hd4Lqju3IB4JNGutqwBthuhPGQOGA0_h8EjuvgSOm1QRXGqalAfnkj4Q#)
-   10,000 days is also the amount of time it takes Saturn to revolve around the sun, Keenan noted in an interview with [Loudwire](http://www.loudwire.com/?fbclid=IwAR1aBz0XjsuwQhTm_zHiMthBGdylvKD7uNV10d1kK6ZfVz-aYh8F7O0uxj4). "That's the time in your twenty eighth, twenty ninth year when you are presented the opportunity to transform from whatever your hang-ups were before to let the light of knowledge and experience lighten your load, so to speak and let go of old patterns and embrace a new life. It's kind of the story of Noah, and the belly of the whale \[Noah built the Ark; Jonah was swallowed by the whale\]. You sink or swim at that point. And a lot of people don't make it. Hendrix didn't, Janis Joplin didn't, John Bonham. Kurt Cobain didn't quite make it past his Saturn Return. For me, starting to recognize those patterns, it was very important to start constructing songs that chronicled that process, hoping that my gift back would be to share that path and hope that I could help somebody get past that spot."
-   In retrospect, Keenan regrets pouring his private pain into the album. "I think probably the stupidest thing I could have done on **10,000 Days** was put myself out there as much as I did with the tracks 'Wings for Marie (Part 1)' and '10,000 Days (Wings Part 2),'" he explained. "I'll never make that mistake again. It just took too much out of me – too much emotionally, mentally, physically – all those manifestations. Those songs were exploited and misconstrued, people were flippant and dismissive. I won't be doing that anymore. And technically, 'Wings' is very difficult to pull off. If any one of us is off, it falls apart and makes that thing tragic, and that's not a good song for me to have fall apart. It's just too personal."

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qJq9y9xPKWs](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DqJq9y9xPKWs%26fbclid%3DIwAR3rvqPjQZ1-9brY__6e0IM-s2GMLFPj7NGIctN8DlD0X_AMJ03d6Ij71rY&h=AT3bUYCWI95TBEOHNM88w9JEyw_IGdrUM4Jyr0lF5WuNcNFSU7hD-d-EktoG55GgsXdHq3-ZbLVKGvMwUIiOaIDV0ipeCLBpLPYjuTmp6lLSzmH2nUAFIaaY4Yy7G0kmxQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT2aN3bS_AydShT6WhQi0Fd6poz6Ton6DsBKNVqrMGG_AUGcF_M4nX2S0OZD-Tvb9N_0Z0nDjIrHXIOc3YsSo_0qPWvXpCTF2CxzYM2UgRlMyogmKnZxXP9_YXQSHH5meaJJjTXe2e9vIMc2s_O3GffhicqOXogQbzcExjdE-x_1i-Z2GFVeP51-_qsL1BYRrb-cJ_lSSWIv19k4)

### Sean Waters — 2020-08-31T16:55:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-291847>

Time for an update.........

Recently lost a lot of gains in my Gut. Lots of symptoms started appearing in July out of nowhere. Retested my apartment, the EMF has changed in the weeks after I got back from July 4th event at the Farm.

I'd been doing really well with a Leptin RX and an EPCOTx style template... lots of Onions, Sulphur Veg, Garlic and some Grapes with my Salmon or Tuna or Prawns.

However, by July, my anxiety, my reactions to food, depression, all my bad habits returned. I found myself really hungry and starting to fall apart mentally.

Then, I decided to just go full blown Seafood Carnivore again, like I used to in England, and got some great relief from the symptoms. But I knew I had to move. Unfortunately, this was the last 2-3 days of the month and I thought to myself - instead of going somewhere terrible, how about I bio-hack the next month and then plan to move somewhere really optimal.

So I did.

During August I spent the whole time experimenting on my Gut and collecting data. I got a load of Lab Tests done on my Blood and my Stool, especially looking for Parasites, Candida, and anything else.

I started to realise, a change or alteration in my Flora led to a concomitant change in my Mood or state of mind. **This has been the case for nearly 20 years, I know this, I know this so well, but for some reason I choose to not investigate the problem deeper...

What if I am spending all this time in the Sun but I am being held back by a Bug, a Fungus or something else? Am I beating my head against the wall to no avail?
**
So I got all my Labs back, and they confirmed my hypothesis..........

### Sean Waters — 2020-08-31T17:30:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-291854>

**[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7167925/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7167925/)**
**
**Antibacterial Activity of Colloidal Silver against Gram-Negative and Gram-Positive Bacteria**
**
**Abstract**
Due to the emergence of antimicrobial resistance, new alternative therapies are needed. Silver was used to treat bacterial infections since antiquity due to its known antimicrobial properties. Here, we aimed to evaluate the in vitro activity of colloidal silver (CS) against multidrug-resistant (MDR) Gram-negative and Gram-positive bacteria. A total of 270 strains (_Acinetobacter baumannii_ (_n_ = 45), _Pseudomonas aeruginosa_ (_n_ = 25), _Escherichia coli_ (_n_ = 79), _Klebsiella pneumoniae_ (_n_ = 58)\], _Staphylococcus aureus_ (_n_ = 34), _Staphylococcus epidermidis_ (_n_ = 14), and _Enterococcus species_ (_n_ = 15)) were used. The minimal inhibitory concentration (MIC) of CS was determined for all strains by using microdilution assay, and time–kill curve assays of representative reference and MDR strains of these bacteria were performed. Membrane permeation and bacterial reactive oxygen species (ROS) production were determined in presence of CS. CS MIC90 was 4–8 mg/L for all strains. **CS was bactericidal, during 24 h, at 1× and 2× MIC against Gram-negative bacteria, and at 2× MIC against Gram-positive bacteria, and it did not affect their membrane permeabilization. Furthermore, we found that CS significantly increased the ROS production in Gram-negative with respect to Gram-positive bacteria at 24 h of incubation. Altogether, these results suggest that CS could be an effective treatment for infections caused by MDR Gram-negative and Gram-positive bacteria.**

This is done by Coconut Oil and Magnesium in massive quantities. Basically inducing Diarrhoea for a few days, or longer - depending on how bad you have these Bugs/ Candida. Sofor me, with a long history of Crohn's disease and Gut issues, It means that I will likely need to be aggressive.

I also tested,and confirmedthe presence of these problems. As you can see in the labs, I have some eradication to do. I may actually need Diflucan, or some antibiotics, but I would rather try natural or alternative remedies first..........

**So, for this Cycle, and because of how big of an effect I can feel it having, I'm starting with Colloidal Silver.** For 3-4 weeks until late September. I've been on it for 1 week mid-August, with a break of 1 week, and then again for the last week.

Again Day 1-4 I felt fucking horrendous. So much fatigue, low dopamine, hardly any energy, Libido was fucked already but absolutely zero these days. So much ROS and Bacterial die off. Very strange dreams and thoughts, and "episodes/ flashbacks" of very very random and spurious events in my life.......... **Does our Gut Flora hold on to our Memories and Emotions like a second brain? It is an Archive of Data for our Computer?**

Day 5, 6 and 7 of the last week on Colloidal Silver, I've noticed real changes in my Energy and Mood, I can almost feel my Estrogen dropping, **there is a certain "power" in my stride**... **Masculinity, Testosterone, that's what it feels like... ### Sean Waters — 2020-09-14T00:32:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-292089>

Found this picture from about 3 weeks before I started the journal in 2018. It was taken my Ex GF on a beach in Goa, India.......

If you look closely, I have huge patches of skin that is discoloured all over my arms, chest and legs.

My Groin at the time was horrific. So badly miscoloured. I remember loving how the Sun felt on it, completely free of my histamine-reactions at Nighttime.

Nearly 3 years later............ and I'm still only just figuring out the root causes, the big variables, of how to fully reverse it.

My skin now, looks nothing like it. I even look bigger and stronger and way healthier than the photo below. It's shocking to me.

**My Groin and Thigh rash, for the first time in 3 years....... 36 fucking months....... something I've hated so much, has finally Faded to Zero. This change has occured since taking 300-450mg of Flucanazole (Diflucan) for Candida Albicans in the last 2 weeks.
**
_**Sometimes you really need Modern Medicine Intervention to solve a Modern Human problem. I'm glad I've learned this valuable lesson.**_

The only parts of my Skin that remain to be healed, is my Two Fingers that sit inside from the pink, and the side of my right hand. Then my Skin will be **Back To Normal... as one could say. Wow. 3 years in the making WTF.
**
Other things I am targeting with the Candida eradication:

1\. Mental health, mainly:
\- Aggression and irriration
\- Jealousy, anxiety and OTT emotions in my relationships with partners

2\. Poor Gut health/ symptomatic with food (SIBO)

3\. Hormone panel
\- Testosterone
\- Progesterone/ Estradiol ratio

So just got to continue I suppose....

**According to Jack's EPCOTx webinar it can take 3 to 9 months for eradication of Candida with antibiotics, and from what I gather, you never really eradicate, as we need it as part of our ecosystem. I'm going test once a month to see, but also track symptoms.
**
One of the main differences I've noticed so far is how I feel towards my Ex and my relationships. I'd get a knee-jerk anxious reaction deep in my Gut when I thought of my recent partner, but it really isn't knew - it is about 10 years old now and featured in many relationships and I hate it, it would also always lead into Dark channels and low esteem and comparing myself to others - it's a horrible jealous part of me that I reject... it isn't me!!

So I've actually used "Her", as part of my Bio-hack. **We have begun talking again**, and the last month has been really interesting. Talking to her again is huge, for both of us, considering the blow up that happened in Feb. It really rocked both our worlds. And, led to such an unhappy time for both of us afterwards. But, after healing, and learning, we have reconciled. Only to build nothing but friendship and communication... that's it. No expectations. I've been honest about my plans too, to see how I feel towards her once i've altered my Flora.

It is playing such a huge role in my life I can't express it in words. She's super interested of course, which I love about her. It's been nice to not feel such Anxiety and negativity when communicating to... these Antibiotics have really helped establish a balanced version of myself and then we've enjoyed our communication as Friends.... how it is supposed to be before anything else.

She said: "I know we will be together one day without fucking each other up. But IDK how yet, or when. But I know it."

I don't know if that's true either. Or if I will even want to go back there if I change my Gut Flora dramatically. _**Who is Sean Waters other than a name for a Colony of Bacteria layered upon other Colonies of Bacteria?**_
_**
Am I not just a Syncytium of Prokaryotic life?**_

These are dangerous questions to a Fractal-thinking Low Dopamine Human. But, I'm willing to go there as always. I believe whatever is ahead on this road is going to be incredible, mind-blowing and full of adventure as always.

**In fact, [@RMW](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24024/) joins me here in 9 days!!!!!
**
And after some months in the Jungle Palapa we will be heading off to Travel the Yucatan, Chiapas and Oaxaca in the New Year.

My target is to have really made a change to my Gut and my Hormones by that time that I am ready for such a trip.

This year has been Lonely, Frustrating, full of Pain and Breaking of unions, Division, Derision, Anxiety and Worry.......... I feel for everyone. I feel the weight of the whole World in my body. Almost like some kind of Astral telepathy.

**IS THE HUMAN RACE NOT A COLONY OF SYNCTIUM OF COLONIES OF BACTERIA?

ARE WE GOING THROUGH SOME KIND OF MACRO-SCALE GLOBAL DISEASE REVERSAL PROCESS?

God... the tension has been so strong on social media. I've compeltely deactivated Facebook and Social Media. Focus my Time and Energy elsewhere. The weight of the world rests not on my shoulders. I've done my part and will continue to help others..........

I've been helping lots of members and non-members this year too.......... Sara N, Robin as always, a new friend Lindsay, David T, and a big shout out to Azin who is not on the forum but who is going through MAJOR UPHEAVAL in her life in Sweden......... and lots more.

Maybe that's where I focus, real life, real people....the liking and the sharing feels like a WASTE! A one-way transactional energy set up....... No More!**

### Sean Waters — 2020-09-26T18:57:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-292377>

Ok so my 2nd set of Lab Results have come back..........

**Progesterone (Pg):**
22nd August - 0.06 ng/mL
23rd September - **3.84 ng/mL**

**Estrogen:**
22nd August - 93.5 pg/mL
23rd September - **30 pg/mL**

**Estradiol (E2):**
22nd August - 45 pg/mL
23rd September - **14.3 pg/mL**

**Pg/E2 ratio:**
22nd August - 1.33
23rd September - **268.5 !!!! (300-500 is desirable, ideally above 400)**

**LOOK AT THAT PG/E2 RATIO :O .... oh yes......... and it tallies up with my symptoms too:**

1\. I**mprovements my mental health,** a reduction in anxiety for sure in the last week.

**2\. Morning Wood Daily,** it isn't as powerful as I'd like but it's a daily thing now which was missing before.

**3\. Daily Bristol Stool #4, usually in the morning**, which I wasn't getting before.

**4\. Energy and Dopamine** **increased,** a significant change to the last month

**So according to the Lab results, my Progesterone is way too high. For the conventional wisdom ranges. But they also believe high Estrogen is fine, so why the hell would I Listen to them?**

**However, I have seen that the optimal number is around 2 ng/mL and i have nearly double that.** According to the Lab Test company, that range is REALLY high....... most people are supposed to be around 2 ng/mL.

But, to have a Pg/E2 ratio of 400-500 with a Progesterone level of 2 ng/mL, my Estradiol would need to be 5 pg/mL. The optimal labs on this site state that the optimal range for Estradiol (E2) is 15-20.

Currently, my Estradiol (E2) is 14.3. So, really I only want me Progesterone to go UP!.... **meaning, even higher than 4 ng/mL ???**

Slightly confused...............

### Sean Waters — 2020-10-30T22:53:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-293157>

Received 2 messages today from 2 members that really made me feel good. Azin is not on the forum, but the other is Jason. And I haven't shared what he wrote but it genuinely put a smile to my face and me feel motivated inside. Azin I have been working with on recorded Voice Messages about once a week as she completely re-engineers her life in Sweden to come to the tropics, which I am super-proud of, because she has a young son and a family who aren't onboard and so many changes to embrace and she's just doing it. Making it look easy!

Jason of course we know is up against a lot in his life, and is constantly turning new corners looking for change and trying to find sanctuary.... he reached out too and gave me a beautiful message to say he admired my persistence and stamina on my journey, and my commitment to the goal, as well as the Analysis and tweaking of the treatment based on Labs. Two things I often don't give myself credit for. In fact, there is a lot I don't give myself credit for. Lately, I've met more people including my good friend Jackie Jolie who have just inundated me with appreciation, respect and compliments.

Not going to lie, I don't take them well but I think that's because I have an issue there. I also don't give out compliments enough, and appreciation to people who need it. I think that needs to change, I need to love myself and enough to also give praise. It seems to require both strength and love all in one.

This last month has been like a wave of appreciation and love from many different people. In a year where I've had so much more relationship chaos than I anticipated, so much breaking down and dying, **and a large part of it... was my fault.**

There have been some changes in my health, my understanding, as very recent as the last few days - and the last week or so - since returning from the Destin event. I have experienced some deep paradigm changes in my mind. And realised some major errors in my ways. I really identified there is a Deep State in my Gut, like a Corrupt Government, manipulating how I think and how I feel, and I am subject to their Algorithm. This week **I feel like (and I know I have said this sooooo many times before) I have really made a leap in my understanding and I have the key to the problem inside me. It doesn't involve any grand upheaval or change, it's actually more of what I am doing, but with some very small and specific changes to my protocol.
**
I am already feeling the effects of this today, as I write. And it is incredibly liberating. To potentially have success **in the right areas**? To potentially end this shit? Jesus christ. To move past this never-ending struggle to feel good. To find some consistency. To find some liberty and freedom in my life again.

That's when the words of Jason, Jackie, Azin and others really touch my heart. To find this understanding, it came from a period in the last week of real darkness after mistake after mistake after mistake.

Luke (you are not my Son) spoke at the Destin event really powerfully and likely painfully for him personally as he broke down, but he really resonated with me and a lot of other people. As he spoke of **"cutting off the Hydra head, and two more appearing".** He had a complete "ego-death" and complete release of his disdain with his Health, his Gut, his Reality... His Life.
The last time we spoke in Mexico, I was all fired up and when we discussed the key was to move to the tropics and he refused that it would work it blew up and ended with us walking away frustrated. But this time around.... Instead of trying to oppose his views, I explained what happens to me when I get sick.... _it could be eating something - or drinking something, and then BOOM my mental health is in complete chaos for days, even out here..._I explained how much it had destroyed my relationships, not just the Girl I am in Love with still... (another day perhaps) who is in Canada, but my friends this year too - several of them I have had totally destructive moments with. Luckily, the ones that really matter, we have made it through.
I explained a lot of this and I saw him Laugh in relief, which encouraged me, he was almost like "oh my god yes" in the way he laughed. Finding relatability. I realised, he has probably had so much Anxiety, Paranoia, Confusion and Jealousy in his relationships, to completely fill up his mind and completely take over his thoughts, just like me. I thought I need to feed this...... I need to show him how much I have gone through, and what I have learned.

On the face of it - he looks like a completely normal guy and polite and friendly. But inside, he is in total chaos. Only I know that like he does - because our issues in the Gut are quite similar.

It enabled a much deeper and complex discussion, more questions, and it we all had a talk outside the back of Capriccio's cafe when everybody had left. There was only about 10 of us just lingering. David Lam, Jackie, Robin, Corey, Luke and others were there.
It was a phenomenal mini-discussion, and we discussed the Tropics v High Latitude in terms of Culture, Productivity, and how people don't feel productive or sharp in the Heat and the Sun, but better in the Cold. I said that I see the paradigm of "Just Do It" and "Chase The Dream" in a different light to others. That perhaps the Tropical latitude cultures have it right. That they aren't subject to the Algorithm of Google/ FB. That they don't care for corporations and productivity. They have their Family, their Beer, their Tacos and the Baseball games on Sundays... and very low levels of suicide and depression. So who really has it right?

I likened it to the Hare and the Tortoise....... with the Western Work Culture = the Hare. But they burn out fast.

It gave me the leverage to go deeper into how much the Tropics have helped me, and using the Vitamin D data on the Gut/ Autoimmunity being non-existant......... _**I saw a Nurse in Tulum recently for blood tests and she literally had to get me to google Crohn's disease for her because she was interested for her studying, and she had never heard of it before.......... imagine that but speaking to a Nurse in the UK/ US or Canada?
**_
I explained how much the Tropics have changed me. I tried to quench some of the natural scepticism people have about moving there. I explained my Labs, my findings, and the failure/ successes I have had.

**I was HUMAN for Luke that day.** **In January, I was a Youtube Troll.** Despite my intent and my views being the exact same, there were very different outcomes. Although, I don't think he was ready for any of it in January anyway. He was much more ready for it in Destin.
**
I need to become more cognicent. This means I have to change what is occurring in my Gut to improve the situation because it holds so much influence over what I feel and think in the moment. It can change within Seconds. This is something that has changed as I have changed the Patterns of Power in my Deep State in the Gut. My War is to take it back.
**
He promised he would reach out and come down as I offered him to stay with me in Mexico to make it a smooth transition for him, something I rarely do because of how Complex a social dynamic can be when two people are Sick and living together. But he has time, he's young, and I feel the tipping point will be soon. He's on his own path.

So am I ......... and I am learning so much, and having to erase so much too. As my Redox changes, my biology shifts into new grooves, I find that my mind and my capacity to Communicate and Listen is improving too. I hope it continues on this path. As well as giving and receiving compliments and appreciation.
**
To summarise......... whatever you're doing, wherever you are and what you're trying to achieve..... Keep going. That's all you gotta do. No matter how smart you are, nothing can beat Persistence and Stamina.**

### Sean Waters — 2020-11-10T21:37:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-293285>

Under going huge changes here that i haven't seen in years... finally seeing regressions in my Symptoms that continue to plague me.

Skin Problems
Depression and anxiety (without circumstance)
Gut Issues

There is so much I need to write here but I don't have the time right now. Changes physiologically corresponding with spiritual/ mental changes.

I've managed to narrow down my issue to a highly possible **Intestinal Candiasis (Candida infection in Gut)**, that may also be systemic or in other areas. I don't know the extent of it, and testing has let me down recently in identifying it clearly (although it has led me to it's trail), as well as for the last 11-27 years of having it... There is no good test out there for it.

I knew I had Candida, but I didn't give it the importance it deserved. I was biased towards it being a Bacterial infection. Stupidly, I took a short course of Antibiotics to get rid of pathogenic bacteria. That mistake actually led me to Candida... because it got worse. When I returned from Destin I was blasted - my whole immune system and mental health on it's knees. I really shouldn't have gone, but I am glad I did.

I had severe Depression and what I can only describe as Mind-Control for about 3 days. This has happened over the years since I was 16, when I first started having Bad Gut Issues and Mental Health Issues (Leaky Gut etc.). It is where thoughts and images in my mind are not my own, I'm not producing them, they are being forced on me. Like that scene in clockwork orange.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

I have to sit there, for hours - sometimes days on end - whilst my mind goes to some of the darkest parts of me.

Example 1 \- thinking about the girl I love with other people romantically, sexually... it's like really horrible jealousy, but not in a malicious way where I want revenge, more like some kind of apathetic self-pitying depression Jealousy. Hard to explain. So some of these are fabricated images and some of them are actually memories. Which makes it so difficult. They are always accompanied by statements my Love interest may have made... indicating the infidelity is true, or that they don't love me in some way. Or that it is all a lie. It usually leaves me in a state of total depression and I can physically feel the Pain deep in my Gut... like a sinking feeling. Like a Black Hole inside me. When at it's worst, it can bring me to tears and suicidal thoughts. This has happened over and over for 11 years in my relationships. Some of my best friends say that "you go weird over girls sometimes". Like there is a 2nd version of me.

Example 2.... If not about Love, then it can switch and be hyper-aggressive moments of violence... Fights I've had in my life, from physical fights in my past (I've had many unfortunately), or confrontations (such as with friends or former friends), and it can include a vast array of people in my life - even Strangers. I seem to "wake up" out of the mini-dream state that I've been pulled into and I'll be clenching my jaw or fists and actually engaged in that moment completely. I have to say "woah... chill the fuck out, it's not real".

There are more examples but you get the point. **It isn't good, not at all.**

I also think it is behind a lot of my behaviour in the last year. With my Friends, and on the forum here, I have been hyper-aggressive with people. Frustrated. Although I think my intentions were good and what I was saying may have contained ounces of truth, I think my delivery was poor and _possibly that it wasn't necessary at all._.. why was I so frustrated? so angry with the state of things?... it lent itself to a 3 month period over the summer where I spouted a lot of "truth" all over facebook. Despite the facts of it all, was I in a good place?.... Nope.

**That is not what this sweet feeling of serenity I have felt this morning tells me that Life is about. It tells me that is actually un-Wise. When you understand that all things must take their course, for all of us, and that God's plan is above all - no matter how righteous you think you are, that's when you are Wise.**

**So how did I get to these conclusions?**

I came home from the Beach 2 weeks ago in an absolute state of chaos mentally, full of these Examples above ^ just unrelenting War in my mind as I try to grab hold of some peace but it keeps bombarding me. I can't think, I can't stop it. I just keep moving forward and it will pass, it always does eventually. This was just after eating some Chorizo style Sausage in the AM, stuff i don't normally eat. By 9am at the beach I had a completely chaotic mind. **My Gut was pulsing, with a heart beat on the surface, where all the blood was being pumped too, I guess it was inflamed?** **I realised this Gut Pulse and Bloating was a constant feature of when I also had concomitant Mental Health symptoms.**

So I began to track it. As I got home that day I said to my new best friend Alex (my live in landlord who is sat beside me now playing Soul music "My Life in the Sunshine").... can you see this, my Gut is like **pulsing?....**

"Bro... you have a baby man! You got a heartbeat! Congratulations who's the Father?"

"Ha! fuck you!! "

I went inside and grabbed 3 x 100mg pills of Diflucan. I don't know why but I just had a hunch. I needed to see the effect. I had been taking them low dose as I mentioned.**... and then it happened.**
**All of my Mental Health Symptoms subsided.... and the Gut pulsing reduced to a quiet soft beat. Almost silent. I felt PEACE.**

That was my first clue that this was a Candida Issue.

Then I went trawling through Jack's Blogs.... Brain Gut 9 what really killed MJ. Then I relistened to his pieces on Candida in the EPCOT webinar/QA. Then I went off and looked up his referenced books... Yeast Sydrome, Trowbridge - his podcasts, videos. The Yeast Connection, Crook and his stuff. Then more and more.

I flipped the Protocol to focus on Candida. Cut out Onions, but kept Raw Garlic. Upped the Raw Oregano and Herbs. Removed Resveratrol totally. Removed anything causing an issue. I peeled back my whole regime. I added a Candida support supplement at high dose - Garlic, Grapefruit Seed, Oregano, Caprylic Acid, Magnesium Gluconate. Stayed on Progesterone, DHEA and Colostrum.

Within 2 days I had a Bristol Stool #4. This has been consistent now with some fluctuations due to my tinkering. But It's my first positive sign my Gut is doing well. Not had this be so good in YEARS.

Mentally I feel more and more myself everyday. With exceptions to the Herx Die-Off periods. Which are fucking nasty bouts of depression for several hours, or allergic reactions, including tearing my Hands up again like I used to do in 2018 in London........... I will share pics of my Hands later. They were completely stripped of Skin in places last week.

But I can see that it is the Candida responding. Because I NEVER scratch my hands anymore, but there is a resistant Skin Rash there that just will not go away! No matter how much Sun it gets or how much I CT this motherfucker with 45°F water is just won't go!!! It has responded dramatically to the Candida treatment.... this tells me I'm hitting it where it hurts!!

**Candida is so fucking smart, so ancient, so clever. It has figured out a way to block it's eradication once it gets a foothold. It releases 80 toxins into the bloodstream as it is "squeezed" by any Anti-fungal protocol.**

Some of these Toxins are......... Acetaldehyde, Ethanol and Canditoxins.

One of the most interesting but also harrowing things I learned is that because these are Alcohols - _**They destroy your Circadian Biology.**_

and my Micronutrient Analysis based on this ....................

This explains why I seem to require a PERFECT Circadian Environment... because it is stealing all of my Redox.

### Sean Waters — 2020-11-10T21:56:15+0200

### Sean Waters — 2020-11-15T20:09:47+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-293347>

[https://academic.oup.com/femsle/article-abstract/367/16/fnaa134/5896949?redirectedFrom=fulltext](https://academic.oup.com/femsle/article-abstract/367/16/fnaa134/5896949?redirectedFrom=fulltext)

The Qinghai-Tibet Plateau is a harsh environment characterized by low temperature, high altitude and hypoxia, although some native mammals may adapt well to the extreme climate. **However, how animal gut microbial community structure and function adapt to extreme cold climates is not well understood.** Plateau pika (_Ochotona curzoniae_) is an ideal animal model with which to study the effects of climate change on host adaptation by studing intestinal microorganisms. Here, we used 16S rRNA sequencing technology combined with physiological methods to investigate plateau pika gut microbiota in summer and winter. **Due to limited diet resources, the pikas in winter have a lower ability of degradation and fermentation for plant-based food (reduced cellulase activity and total short-chain fatty acids) by decreasing gut microbial diversity and some functional microbes, such as fiber-degrading bacteria _Oscillospira_ and _Treponema_. Metagenomic prediction showed that most of those gene functions associated with metabolism (e.g. energy metabolism and lipid metabolism) were less abundant in winter, implying that the plateau pika slows diet fermentation and weakens energy requirements in the cold season.** Our results have significance for explaining the mechanism of wild plateau mammals adapting to a high-altitude cold environment from the perspective of gut microbiome.

### Sean Waters — 2020-11-27T03:03:00+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-293525>

One of the biggest things that isn't really made clear on that Snapshot is the improvements to **my Sleep........

I've pretty much had Insomnia/ Interrupted and short sleep durations for the last 3 years. This week I've actually had such Deep Sleep and woke up after 8 hours and been like erm Shit, it's the morning....
**
Anotherbig thing is that not only has my Sleep improved but it is that I have **felt really full of energy, with lots of Hard Wood (sorry ladies but it's important!) and Libido... meaning my Pathways are moving OUT of Survival/ Cortisol and into Progestation.........** granted, I am taking Progesterone and DHEA, but the idea is slowly reduce over time.

........... and the biggest, #1 change is **My Mental Health.
**
Jesus fucking christ. Some of the days recently have sucked so bad, and in the last 3 years, I'd probably say I've spent the majority of my living days in a state of Depression or "HyperActivity" - this is evident in my journal, especially in the last year. It's almost like an ADHA/ Autism, an aggression, reactivity.... simply, this is not a habit or behaviour I want to retain.

I feel as though I have dropped weight from my mind and body. Let a lot of shit go.

The depression is just disappearing, and my energy and motivation for Life is returning so fast I can barely keep up.......... I'm like SHIT WHAT DO I WANT TO DO WITH ALL THIS ENERGY?

Another huge aspect is this: **I have become MORE SENSITIVE TO LIGHT, BUT QUICKER TO REBOUND FROM NEGATIVE AFFECTS OF ARTIFICIAL LIGHT !!**
That's not a Gain/ Symptom I was expecting... but I even notice Candle Light now, and it's not like it bothers me, but I just really FEEL it. I also really FEEL the Sun, and I feel like I need WAY LESS.
**I've also started doing CT this week (as you can see).... and noticed how tremendously I respond to Cold.... makes sense with my H1 haplotope. My Sleep has really reacted to this.

It's left me wondering if somewhere at a slightly higher latitude would actually be more Optimal for me once this Candiasis is over with.** It's something I need to test and consider, because i've been set on the Tropics 4 LYF.... but now I'm thinking, hmm.... Mexico yes cause I can use Cold here, but also - my Mother does REALLY GOOD in the MEditerranean and before I got sick so did I......... That's a long way off, but definitely a new idea to ponder.

Continue to see sharp drops in symptoms (today) and on the 17th which is really good. But, generally I seem to be consolidating around 13 points on my Symptom score. (The Lower, closer to zero the better) which is still excellent compared to the 30s I was in during September/ October.

Mental Health symptoms remain almost completely absent. The only 1's appearing were for some very minor waves of depression that I could have not counted. But i wanted to keep it accurate. Something, is more than nothing. So it's worth a point.

Continue to CT and I'm feeling warmer and developing good muscle tone.

I continue to see improvements in my Sleep, my energy, Libido and morning wood.

I'm now having the BS#4 pretty much every day. I've not had constipation or diarrhea in weeks. Stools are good colour and perfect consistency and I'm obviously eating A TONNE OF FIBRE from Almonds, Spinach, Chard, Ginger, Onion, Garlic, Avocado, Cilantro, Parsley, Rosemary, Flax Seed (occasionally), Spirulina, Chlorella... which means all of these "bad" vegetables the Carnivore crowd wants to demonise are actually helping this Auto-Immune/ Crohn's/ Candida kid get a lot better.... they have just been misunderstood due to a lack of knowledge on how to Heal the Gut.

I truly don't think anyone can start a Gut Heal Protocol that is this bad, by eating Vegetables, without experiencing discomfort. It's best to remove. But later I think you have to add them back in once you have control of the infection or the inflammation (both really), because they are essential to re-building the Flora. This is well studied and documented. We must be careful of our biases.

I've increased the Oregano Oil on days where I get die-off/ herx... almost like I know the Candida is hurt, so I punch it harder.

Today I added in **Resveratrol** for the first time in nearly 1 month, the last time I did this I felt really bad die-off. But so far today, no problems and I actually feel great.

I have also dropped down Diflucan by 50mg... again, not seemed to notice too much of an issue there after a few days. **I want to increase Natural Anti-fungals and begin to uncouple from with Pharmaceuticals. I have a Berberine, Black Walnut Hulls, Artemesinin and Citrus seed extract compound supplement on the way.**

I also want to come down on Progesterone. All of the supplements actually. And just use Vegetables and good Food to replenish my Redox Antioxidant Pathways/ Nutrition.... **But, I'm still only 5-6 weeks into a 6-8 months process,** and so I have to be patient here, and take massive stock of what I have Gained so far. Which is a mesmerizing level of asymptomatic daily life and **an absolutely surging and growing Cognition, Awareness and Lust for life.**

I'm still not where I want to be with my Health, and there has been a relentless force within me that desires to finish the fight early, I felt like I could sense the enemy was weak and I could take him out. ### Sean Waters — 2021-01-01T20:25:35+0200

And the following week I maintained a dose of 36 before upping to 42 at the very end. The Pau D' Arco tea has been massive too, another one that can induce massive die off symptoms and in combo with Oregano it has been potent.

I saw Jack on the 20th and he made the point that he thought I did not need Flucanazole or Progesterone based on my Labs and also didn't think I had a Candida issue, and that this was just Crohn's and Autoimmunity at the core.

Whilst I agree, I actually think the root cause of the Crohn's is from a Candida problem, I also think that whilst I must stay here and re-build my Mitochondrial health with Mexican Sunlight for the next few years, there is clearly a massive difference in my wellbeing on a **daily and weekly and monthly basis** and it seems to make a massive difference to how I experience Life **in this moment!
**
Jack was absolutely ok with Oregano Oil and the Pau D Arco Tea and also suggested that even though the Vegetables were producing a Bristol Stool #4 that I might do a lot better on a much lower Carb template.... and advised to stick to some Avocado, healthy fats like Coconut Oil and Ghee, small amounts of Almonds, and Leafy Greens like Spinach, Cilantro, Herbs like Rosemary and Oregano and Basil, and to keep the Onion and Garlic at moderate level ... "you can easily overdo it".

I think that pertains to the fructans and deuterium in those two. Finding the balance between having the benefits of the Vegetables, but also mitigating the downsides: carbs feed candida, deuterium isn't handled well by my Gut flora or my Gut Cells, Oxalates etc.

So I've been playing around with different templates and I have to admit that the Carnivore style completely omits my Depression and gives me such energy. Even if I go high on the Oregano & Pau D'Arco I get bad Hand Flares but the depression is kept at bay. If I introduce the Vegetables at higher levels I notice my energy and mood suffers.

However, I have felt EXCELLENT days whilst eating Fruit & Vegetables lately. So it all depends on the Die-Off if I'm honest.... and if I'm more honest, I seem to have lost a handle on that in the last few weeks. I really don't know what is die-off now and what is just inflammation.

This is due to a lot of late nights and some rocky times in my Relationships in the last 2 weeks. I've had one of the worst days of the year on the 20th and felt broken. But, since then, I've had some unbelievable people step into my life the very next day and a huge change......... _**this was all at the exact time of the Saturn & Jupiter conjunction and the movement into Aquarius.... I'm not Astrology-driven but I am highly aware of the mirroring occurring between our planet and the planets out in space. It's at times absolutely mind-blowing how much synchronicity can be found when you look for it.**_

### Sean Waters — 2021-01-11T19:01:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seans-optimal-journal.20757/post-294519>

Update since the start of the new year.

Going Full Carnivore has led to some of my best days energetically and mentally. Even Avocadoes and little bits of Garlic or Veg can disrupt that feeling - it is insanely good. It's not well reflected here because the sheet is showing "absence of symptoms" rather than "presence of Gains"... but anecdotally yeah I have felt incredible.

[@RMW](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24024/) commented the other day on how much Muscle Mass / Body Comp has improved, he said since October I have stacked on some muscle, that was a really positive thing. I've also felt it, but you can never tell for sure when you see yourself everyday.

So naturally, I feel great and look great - I want to stay on Carnivore. BUT, if you look at my Bristol Stool Chart it has completely gone haywire, and so if a Bristol stool #4 is optimal Gut and gut flora then I am wayyy off. First I just stopped going, and then I started to get 6s an 7s.

That may be a little bit of adaption so I'm going to continue for a while and wait for changes. I'm also prepared to just make the Bargain and say fuck it, because Life is soooo much better in Carnivore, I am so productive, so social and feel so alive and strong. But yeah, my Gut clearly doesn't like it right now, and the problem with that is also that it downstream effects my Libido and Reproductive system - because of how much they are linked.

My Crohn's disease was in the Terminal Ileum section of the bowel, right near the appendix and the ascending colon - so it is very proximal to all the other reproductive tissues and my bladder.

So, this is something I'm monitoring.

Also tried Young Living Melrose Oil (Tea tree and Rosemary) and did some mouth oil pulling with it, as someone I'm consulting with sees that the issue is in my mouth/ gums as well. Still need to get this retainer removed, anyone know a biological dentist in Mexico?

Sleep has been better although the Jungle is freezing fucking cold at the moment, you're probably shaking your head like no it's mexico, but seriously - it's fucking cold and my palapa has no insulation, no glass window - just mosquito nets - it's freezing!

I also backed off the Curcumin which was high dose/ anti-cancer dose and so then I started taking another brand just yesterday and hoping that can help me Gut on Carnivore and regulate things.

Not even Seafood or Fish in weeks except for one meal. All Pork, Eggs and Beef.

Still taking Oregano oil and Pau D Arco. The Tea is really really good, definitely helps bowel movements and also seems to help kidney function. The amount I pee has drastically reduced. I used to always be running to pee but now hardly ever.

Still not got round to the Dirty EMF solution, but I am liasing with Sean from LessEMF.com in New York and he is gonna help me figure out what I need here, he's a good guy, then get it all shipped down here.

Rosemary Oil on top of everything else seemed to really induced Hand Flare-ups. Becoming conscious of the fact that this is probably less of a Candida die Off thing and more of an inflammation thing - it's too easy to get into a mindset of _**"KILL KILL KILL"**_ when really I need to be in the mindset of **_"Reduce, reduce, reduce"...._** and think more about inhibiting the Candida while providing lots and lots of electrons to my Gut (and lots of Protons to my Gut Flora  ubiquination series)..... it's always a game of inflammation or oxidation-reduction....

Is the hand-flare ups or the depression more about an inflamed patch of tissue in my Gut that is Leaky and Oxidised which leaks into my bloodstream to my brain?... so adding Rosemary and other Potent Oils or different foods is causing stress in that area?..... or is it when it releases Acetaldehyde and Histamine from the Candida?.... or is it both?

The only thing I will mention is this.

-   Carnivore = No carbs/ sugars = Yeast cannot ferment and create alcohols like acetaldehyde which is a neurotoxin = no depression

-   Carnivore = protein = histidine = Yeast can convert to Histamine = Eczema, itching and histamine flares

### Sean Waters — 2021-01-12T19:00:15+0200

Thanks Caroline, I'm not on facebook but I will look him up. I really need one in Yucatan though, not abroad.

Well you just said it, but that's how you feel and I don't mind you needing to point that out.

As I point out above, I feel excellent in many areas (mentally, energy, muscle mass) but many areas I have to accept trade-offs. The other confusing thing is that I was able to feel really good (look back at the charts from Nov/ Dec) whilst eating tonnes and tonnes of Vegetables, Nuts and some Avocado **AND** I was able to have perfect Stools.

My mood is often highly strung, instead being depressed, which I prefer but it's not a state I think is fruitful forever.

To make Serotonin we need to eat some Carbs to enable the Typtophan uptake into the Brain. This means Carnivore/ Keto/ Fasting selects for Tyrosine and Dopamine creation. Although that is preferable to people, it's still a preference, and is not gospel. Especially as when you look to the wild, Hadza or Masai, they just eat whatever is available. But they consume up to 100 different species of fruits (mostly berries) and tubers (root vegetables). We are omnivores for sure, but in a blue light toxic person with disease the fruits can become intolerable.

**The feeling of High Dopamine is not necessarily equal to Happiness and Quality of mood. It can make me very "efficiency" focused. Hyped up. Highly strung. Intolerant....... this means I'm productive productive productive. Like what the Chinese economy looks like at a birds eye view. But are the people really enjoying their lives, happy? Compassionate? Do you really lust to be a part of their system? Being squashed into the subway by station officers to work 8 til 8.

Perhaps that's good? Perhaps it is not?.... right now, in my current Redox state I have to make a choice between Depression and being Highly Strung/ Hyped up. At least with the latter I can work, but is this something I see as a long term solution, not unless I am able to calm down, I can't see myself being a good partner to someone in this state. That's just me personally, others may feel wonderful on carnivore I'm sure.

_This is just my n=1._
**
The other thing is that although I've got morning wood, I feel much less interested in finishing and actually climaxing than before. Not sure if that's normal or not. I don't think it is to be honest!

I'm in uncharted territory here.... I don't know anyone else that's doing what i'm doing. Which is why I keep this whole journal wide open and completely honest, because it has to be for me to be able to fully see what has happened. I don't care if Carnivore is my favourite or not, I just need the truth and if it is the truth then great - if it is not, then it's not.**

B**ack in Feb last year I went Carnivore and I was so hyped up. I did some really drastic things and I was super aggressive and hostile. So I'm having to be highly cautious right now of my words and feelings because of what it does. In 2019 from February to July I went Carnivore, and the longer I continued the more depressed I got.
In August 2019 I found Onions, Garlic and Rosemary to be a major major boost to my mood but again it got me all "fired up". But, I smelt like a fucking frenchman. **But now those same things make me feel down, and Carnivore hyped me up. Why? I don't know.**

-   **But, do I love the fact I have Muscle and feel stronger? Yep.**
-   **Do I love that I can do my job and focus? Yep.**
-   **Do I love that I wake up with energy? Yep.**

**
The issue is Caroline, I'm a little bit fucked. I've got an inflammatory bowel disease, a major fungal infection and it seems to have really influence over my Mind. I can't really do jack shit about it but choose the best options I have available on a daily basis. **It's a trade off.... because I'm sick, in many ways, I'm really fucking sick. It sucks. But it is what it is and I have to play the hand I'm dealt right now.****

Jordan Peterson loved it, but then he relapsed, twice. Many people (like Sara) find that it doesn't work for them, and it is very frustrating because we feel like there is good place for us to rest and others are doing so well why can't we do it? So, it's important to not get dogmatic about it because ultimately we all have different mitochondrial diseases and we need to do what works for us.

Clinically, Resistant Starches have been shown over and over to lower inflammation and improve Gut Flora long term in many participants, meaning that people begin to be able to eat more and more and feel better and better. This has been shown in people with Inflammatory Bowel Disease in research studies. But was it 100% of people that responded? no, it was just a majority. So again, it comes back to n=1. Jack used this in January 2014 webinar to make the case that those with Crohn's can do really well with Certain Nuts and Dark Chocolate. He still eats these to this day, almost everyday. He said it seemed to offset his Gut Flora risk with non native EMF. But in another webinar he says those with IBD can't handle those things yet..... Why? Inflammation.

So clinically we have to walk that fine line of this equation:
Low Inflammation in the patient + Patient compliance (symptoms) + correcting Gut Flora by introducing prebiotics/ starches + removing fungal infections + managing toxicity/ detoxification + patient's personal desires/ work/ career/ relationships.

All of those things often contradict each other at many points. There is no perfect ratio, it all depends on the individual.

Often, that concept is lost on forums, this is because not many people who engage have had clinical training of any kind. That's fine, but we must be aware that our own biases are often at play and what works for us might be harmful or not beneficial for others.

Ultimately the Redox of the Mitochondria is the real truth, and so Carnivore doesn't improve that long term, ony Environment does. But allows me to tap into a state of mind that is free of depression (which of all the symptoms is the worst I completely admit, it's like being in hell). What I am doing here is trading off the quality of my gut flora and losing my ability to make Serotonin to feel calm and joyous but improving my ability to make Dopamine an be productive.

If you look back to December I had some of my best days whilst eating a plate full of Veg, Avocadoes, Garlic, Onions and Almonds... I was also absent of Depression and Mental Health symptoms. **It's all there on the chart, I didn't see any "i told you so's" back then?**

Something has altered in the last few weeks, possibly the UV here, possibly what's been going on in my life, possibly the protocol I'm doing is too aggressive on the Candida and getting bad die-off, perhaps the fact I've stopped taking the Diflucan and the Progesterone, perhaps that I've been going out more into Blue Light.

The last few days of being Carnivore I've felt nausea and I've been extremely pissed off. I've also felt some depression at times this week, so it has gotten me worried now because the Carnivore platform I'm standing on is starting to shake. Am I making my Gut worse by doing this?

Really appreciate your comment and in no way loading off on you here, but this is honestly how I feel about it all. It's really really difficult to be in this situation, I don't admit that or show too much vulnerability because I am still lucky in many ways, but that's the truth.

I empathise with [@Sara Paez](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24918/) on the other thread because she's actually in a worse situation than me in terms of her options right now and doesn't have remote income and didn't even have a passport and so I knew how much she's struggling, I was actually the one who told her to go Carnivore originally to try it out (because she was so symptomatic) but after the results showed in August (in high UV) that's it not working and making her worse I knew that it wasn't the answer for her. I knew she needed a hell of a lot of Omega 3 and not Omega 6 rich Beef to quench the inflammation. She was clearly not responding to Carnivore, but I do apologise for loading off on you and sorry if I offended you, but I felt absolutely compelled to give her an extreme opposite to that answer based on everything I've written here because I was scared/ conscious of her going further into a hole she couldn't get out of.... one example of many: Nutritionally, I had no idea where she was at/ what she was deprived of and what Beef & Salt would do for her

I was ridiculously healthy for my own estimations and I was doing CrossFit and I weight 15kg heavier than i do now and it was all muscle, I was 94kg or 205 lbs of muscle with only 10% body fat.

### Sean Waters — 2021-01-14T16:01:03+0200

Ok so after taking the 1 tbsp of Charcoal yesterday I developed a slowly increasing hollowness and weakness in my chest, and then by the evening I started to feel a chill and pretty "out of it".

I went to sleep super early I was so tired and then I proceeded to have the wildest lucid dreams all about Sex and I also felt like I was hallucinating a little at points as I thought people were outside my house.

I woke up today with a low-grade Fever. My throat is a little swollen around the lymph nodes, and I have a very minor cough, and my Head feels heavy and I have periodic minor headaches.

My Skin Rash on my Hand also flared up last night and I scratched it a lot, but it actually feels the smoothest and looks the clearest it has looked in a very long time.

I feel weak and my temperature is a little up and down.

But really, it's pretty mild overall. I have just not experienced something like this in such a long time. I can't actually remember the last time I had an actual Flu like reaction or a Fever. It's been years.

I panicked a little, as I know if my Gut is inflamed (Crohn's) then this is typically How I'd feel during a flare up - **however, with a Crohn's flare up my Gut would be all over the place... Pain, diarrhoea, and pure craziness. But my Gut is actually remarkably quiet.
**
I'm tempted to Fast.... my intuition is urging me to Fast right now and I don't know why. It has been telling me that for about 4 days now so I'm going to follow it and just not eat for day or two.

I've added in some Chlorella and it made me feel better today. I've reduced the Charcoal down to 1 tsp x 3 times per day.... **_but i might push it a little higher again because I think my body is actually beginning to Fight this Mold/ Candida itself and really have a complete immune response. I think the silence or inactivity against the infection is actually a bad sign, showing how suppressed my Immune system is. Perhaps now with these Binders taking away all these Neurotoxins by CNS and Immune system can actually take this thing on by itself._**

The other thing is - I'm blessed to be in a WiFi free environment at the 20th Latitude. Even though it has been raining here the Light is still super super good - it's like British Summer. Plus, I have a High Vit D level and a good BUN Creatitine and Hormone panel... so I am ready to hit the Detox button now.

I feel like trash, but it feels right. My intuition is telling me to keep going here.......

### Sean Waters — 2021-01-14T23:38:43+0200

Wow I've felt so fucked all day.... Fever, Fatigue, Weakness, Swollen lymph nodes and Nausea.....

I have fasted up til now which is around 23 hours and got plenty of Sun today (it finally appeared)

I have just experienced constant bombardment in my mind today of really really old memories and experiences from School and College and my Job in London..... I say this often here, but when i go through the Die-off or the Detox process I seem to get flooded with a Movie reel of memories and they are all separate and not connected, very sporadic......... of course my Ex and my other exes appear in my mind too and usually thoughts that make me feel low esteem.

But it's 4.36 now and I have to tell you I feel a weight lifted from me that I can't describe. I can breathe fully through my nose, I can smell Alex's aftershave across the garden, my Hands seem somewhat ok and not red or inflamed, and my energy and mood has increased massively.

Noticing that the gut wrench response to those triggers, like my ex, have lost their power. I hope this is not temporary.... But i haven't felt this good while Fasted for 23-24 hours since I was in London before I got sick. I have reminiscent feelings about being back there, before all of this shit turned south in 2017.

Detox for the win I think. Will keep updating.

Sorry to hear you are experiencing rain.... both physically and emotionally. We need rain just as much as we need sunshine. Because without watering we don’t grow! We also need the 42 degree angle after the rain to see the rainbow! Ever wonder why that number is so important?

You communicated that it was dormant until recently? Remember how Jack commented on fungus growth at the farm as an indicator of 5G in his area? In a 5G world can we live within Mother Nature’s rules? Or, in a home with no windows? I am not saying you need to move but maybe try sleeping in a car for a night or stay with one of the other members just so you can rule out your environment. Or, look at your trees and growth... fungus or mold. I think 5G, and maybe all the other technology, is that silent snake that slithers in and messes with our thoughts... it’s mind warfare. I can immediately tell when I am in a 5G area because my recall memory goes completely out the window and my vision blurs. I feel like my body has mutated or evolved from the rashes as I don’t get them anymore. My husband tends to be more aggressive or combative and now does get the body rashes. Remember our food chain, animals, water and bacteria are all effectived by these signals too. Basically anything that is alive is in the same environment and not immune to 5G either. Probably why the push for GMO food too because it will be impossible to grow real food. Everything will be depleted of its nutrients just like when you cook food in the microwave it loses its nutritional value. I would also guess that’s why your body wants to fast. For myself it became increasingly difficult to fast in a 5G environment because I was constantly being depleted of my water and oxygen. A good tip that works for me.... Drink and cook from copper as it will kill bacteria that is growing. It’s also a good way to add copper to your system.

Also, a general dentist should be able to take off your permanent retainer. I certainly would not recommend this but my daughter didn’t like how hers felt when she got it and took it off herself with snippers. Ugh! I did end up taking her back to the orthodontist so he good finish what she started. He just drilled it off. In hindsight it was probably a good thing she did take it off!

Remember skin is our largest organ. You can buy organic activated charcoal soap... I like to use this!

Also... doing this might just be the answer to the toxicity and stress you are experiencing.

### Sean Waters — 2021-01-17T19:42:11+0200
